name: =?utf-8?Q?Christian=20Nascimento=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Inflation is out of control
body:
| | |
---
| | November 20, 2021
---
| Dear Friends,
Inflation is one of the most pressing issues that we face today. You feel it when you go to the store or pay at the pump.

[I recently had the opportunity to weigh in on this topic ](https://cn4pa.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e0d3836abfea301482298bb99&id=497476adfe&e=fa7e3557b6)[in the Delaware Valley Journal](https://cn4pa.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e0d3836abfea301482298bb99&id=a8308f1b1e&e=fa7e3557b6)[. ](https://cn4pa.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e0d3836abfea301482298bb99&id=a3cb434c42&e=fa7e3557b6) Our comments in the article show the sharp contrast between me and Madeline Dean. She thinks that government regulation and spending is the way to combat inflation. You and I know that we have to build a pro-growth economy that works for families and small businesses. And now Dean and House Democrats have just passed an unconscionable bill that radically alters the government's role in our lives for the worse.
This reckless spending puts our economy at risk and dramatically changes the trajectory of our children and grandchildren's fiscal future.

It is time for voters to elect a leader who will deliver common sense and competency back to Congress.

Christian Nascimento
#CN4PA

name: Wendy Rittenhouse
subject: NOT GUILTY.
body:
| | | | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=58115f2b429f4bf8aaf10f857e0279a3&_e=zGSFOpTJpkGxT4FWhsTSeIfRsXz7zOm4aht0TiMTNK8850GRqN8ljUj-DUXwZ56GuxQZynYinCzw4zIvLETVzm1v-qpc5FRs4Qwa9NH6VxgDdkqDSxDage_6v8SJd3sCjP-Oksgiyf_O2fJPn4UwDXrrpzqVf3nweV9rH_F9XK5PZFSh-sFnhvvS6_8sUFEswlflUNkiHSBOHmB9k7ahccQY2dvXsWcs2Butto3HasSlHsKWva7Uh3aPbMt25tyXjLvHQUSGP_rGtjp2QHG7IIQpnfQr6IIKKv1L0UAStQw%3D)
---
|
---
Peter,

**Kyle was just ACQUITTED and is now officially FREE!**

This was a victory for the truth, for justice, and for every American's God-given and unalienable right of self-defense.

We are so overcome with emotion, and as hard as that was, we are thankful.

We are thankful for the millions of Americans who stood with Kyle from the start.

We are thankful for the many others who watched the trial with an open mind, realized that they had been lied to for a year and a half, and spoke out.

And we are thankful to the jury which put aside bias, considered the facts, and came to the right decision.

Now, we will try to return to something that resembles a normal life – **however that requires one more major push to settle our case-related debts and pay off what we hope will be our final legal bills.**

**[So please, take all that positive energy I know you're feeling and make an urgent donation to help us close this very ugly chapter in our lives.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=58115f2b429f4bf8aaf10f857e0279a3&_e=zGSFOpTJpkGxT4FWhsTSeIfRsXz7zOm4aht0TiMTNK8850GRqN8ljUj-DUXwZ56GuxQZynYinCzw4zIvLETVzhlnq9gMzQeZjCUXiczWW4lHMzkXarNJyJrrqW-EPynRqq_sAFB5vJt4owciRkGmcyTcHv_Nc88y7lD-L4bw2r0bTr9zcnfzynmStGIhMIMPBr5bsnp9U5JGG24u0iouXJNgqJzrcgOC-U0iXcd4el9SWRFOO6izVuB_HXUy1Aq_aXdo3JdzrVjrNehdK6MpPVsvObijNv79gk6Ib7weeHs%3D)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=58115f2b429f4bf8aaf10f857e0279a3&_e=zGSFOpTJpkGxT4FWhsTSeIfRsXz7zOm4aht0TiMTNK8850GRqN8ljUj-DUXwZ56GuxQZynYinCzw4zIvLETVzsA2F4tyNXujbRs24L8bb_jPHvaNNoUF-tNfeKV3cWG0eoXj_8PdzD-e2jMHsUnDP4c1ByV-O5ozb3DQmGJu3bVO9C86dJTNKBuaYqxKoRZu0gnn14zWRwC6j4isQ5JKqN0NUPgEf-ubzC4zpLbIPFd5HmTBA9LM1cbxJeCyR-pfVbHzjmXDjb0__E73EopSClTqlhpKyl3GPttrsqudMpE%3D)
|
---
Any funds left over will be transferred into Kyle's scholarship fund so that he'll be able to graduate from college debt-free.

You'll be hearing from us again, but for now, and from the bottom of our hearts – thank you. Thank you. Thank you.

With love,

Wendy Rittenhouse
|

name: Cynthia Cano, Beto for Texas
subject: Update on our first week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Our momentum to build a bigger, bolder vision for Texas is growing fast.
#
Our momentum to build a bigger, bolder vision for Texas is growing fast.
**FIRST: On Monday, Beto announced our campaign to be a governor for ALL of Texas.** Beto's running to move forward together on what the people of Texas want, like better jobs and safe communities.
**THEN: This grassroots team stepped up in a huge way!** In the first 24 hours of this campaign, more than 20,000 donors pitched in to send a clear signal that this movement is ready to take on Greg Abbott's war chest.
**NOW: Beto is traveling across the state meeting with folks and listening to the issues most important to them.** Check out this headline from Tuesday's event in Laredo:
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/49913?refcode=ema20211120-163416&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=163416%2E444211%2ELNyrE_)
Defeating Abbott is going to take a massive effort over the upcoming weeks and months. We have big plans to scale up our campaign, but every new organizer hired, volunteer recruited, and voter registered all depend on the grassroots resources we raise from emails like this one.
[Please, will you contribute $3 or more to help grow our grassroots momentum and power this campaign to replace Greg Abbott with a leader ready to put Texas back on track?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/49913?refcode=ema20211120-163416&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=163416%2E444211%2ELNyrE_)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/49913?refcode=ema20211120-163416&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=163416%2E444211%2ELNyrE_)**
Thank you for being a part of this. Together, we can do something truly important for the future of Texas, so I hope we can count on you to have Beto's back.
More soon,
Cynthia Cano
Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20211120-163416-footer&t=22&refcode2=163416_444211_LNyrE_&akid=163416%2E444211%2ELNyrE_)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=23&akid=163416%2E444211%2ELNyrE_)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=163416%2E444211%2ELNyrE_)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

body:

I am proud to use my voice and my vote to push back on the Democrat's out-of-control spending plans.Approaching 2022, Republicans are in excellent position to take back the majority in Congress, making it more important than ever that we take back the majority! Peter,

There's no doubt about it: Anthony Fauci needs to resign.
* _He lied about masks. _
* _He lied about funding gain of function research._
* _And he's never going to tell the truth about the origins of COVID-19._

He's intentionally misled, misinformed, and failed the American people.

But here's the thing: a power-hungry bureaucrat like Fauci is never going to step down on his own accord.

Just look at this recent headline:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58827719:JoG1K42NY:m:1:3253819041:7637D3F779F772F10850C843114D3E18:r)
That leaves us one choice, Peter. If Fauci won't step down, he must be FIRED.

**[I AGREE: FIRE FAUCI NOW>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58827719:JoG1K42NY:m:1:3253819041:7637D3F779F772F10850C843114D3E18:r) **

We know if the media's favorite doctor had his way, COVID-19 would NEVER be in the rearview mirror.

You can tell by the way he downplays natural immunity, hypes up any "variant" of the virus, and ignores the most recent, effective treatments for Coronavirus.

There's no vaccine, no law, and no regulation that will satisfy Fauci EVER. He won't sacrifice the power if he has a choice. _That 's why he's basically telling us he's NEVER going to step down. _

But I refuse to allow Fauci's chaos to become permanent. I'm calling on the administration to do what is right and FIRE FAUCI NOW.

Will you join my fight by chipping in today?
[**FIRE FAUCI: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58827719:JoG1K42NY:m:1:3253819041:7637D3F779F772F10850C843114D3E18:r)

In Liberty,

name: Trump Social Media Notifications
subject: EXTENSION: 5 minutes left to join Trump's new social media site ⏳
body:
As a Trump Social Member, you are the first to receive this private message. Open ASAP. It's time sensitive.

|
---
| | | **PRIVATE MESSAGE FOR TRUMP SOCIAL MEMBERS:**

name: Pro Life Update
subject: The 500,000
body:
I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email.
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5cs6u7kupu44onr3ocob2vuivgetm0m5vh0ba9g_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ie4ob2cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhnjgar4r0nb1gm7pn7uft6dlbnsgj8dk8ncsp00_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ie4ob2cdh2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zeh8coiacdie9od2ob59k0m0rqcprhfukr73dqpo_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ie4ob2cdh2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z4f0ne7547ro1d2pm9e65ib16od7c6m6jn7idm2o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ie4ob2cdh2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhk2g9nlkjusa02j72fvi4vs4fea91qb54m5puao_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ie4ob2cdh2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zh4uvemtufnk9tqlvc1s1f95gh4cmhjaeg69jvr8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ie4ob2cdh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Lieutenant Governor-Elect Winsome Earle Sears
subject: The Left Wants To Put Us Down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by WINSOME SEARS FOR LT
body:
Coded In** [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8046%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=r%2fXPH%2fo%2b1Z2T6ac1nhwDfQ&sysid=1)
Because of people like you and me
---
| | | | | | |
---
| |
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18849%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WFiablMCu%2bYOOP8FN7tusA&sysid=1)

Dear Patriot,

The left wants to put us down, call you and me dangerous, call us racists, and say that we’re white nationalists.
[**RIDICULOUS!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18840%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vMkqjYt7OVaAQdoINEKLFg&sysid=1)
---

We made history by electing the most diverse ticket ever in the Commonwealth of Virginia!

_They are spiraling out of control because the people are falling for their tricks any longer._

**[I’m asking you to donate to our cause so we can show the left what America is really about.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18841%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=e8A6ekhGIYCkAPzz%2bZHrbw&sysid=1)**

They can try to put us down if they want to, but I know that you and I are stronger than any of the lies they want to spread.

Together, we’re going to save Virginia and the United States and end the division of the left.
[**Donate $11**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18842%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pIg%2bL02I2PMuf9zp9JAc9g&sysid=1)

We are the greatest nation on earth because of people like you; thank you!

name: National Republican Polling
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from National Republican Polling is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zkmt2ajoc931dlolbp373vkdsi8919aj586bac98_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ie4ob6cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z1hikk0hieb3oh5lgn83gsrcpdqf09vvhvgvvtp0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ie4ob6cph2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zsruc2u2gcgh14qb3codn89jj9k9t8fte57vo67g_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ie4ob6cph2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

subject: NEW 8-Pound Solar Generator is HERE
body:
Navy SEAL tested: see it in action!
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0igjgc90al87cq4b4j88vv3eekde053qnptu89o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ie6o32c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onimlijaoljcphneo37mlq7adtle2r74t1m66rmbc3nmlr30o9jccoe8olickqn1puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75dr66libacr7mph6cdb0m9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)
# "Weird" 8-Pound Solar Device
Could Save Your Life in a
Dangerous Blackout
**[NEW] #1 Requested Item of 2021 -
Introductory Stock Extremely Limited** [**➡ Navy SEAL tested: see it in action!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6pj5if4epntvteaqv1uumd954ke62i9fhfg5p7o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ie6o32c5h2bs) [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zj5ktqkua34pmo08m2a8vfpdm7s83t92ka0tj4jo_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ie6o32c5h2bs) [**> > Video: This mini solar generator powers devices and weighs less than a housecat**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zk6v1a1rsqsg6q6u0c1msuqe6gossnp0fn1s4j0o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ie6o32c5h2bs) Hello my fellow Patriots. I'm Cade Courtley, former Navy SEAL Platoon Commander, sniper, and author of the _SEAL Survival Guide._ If 2020 has taught us anything... it's not IF you need a backup plan... **it's WHEN**. A deadly pandemic, blackouts sweeping the nation, wildfires, hurricanes, social unrest and crumbling power grids. Crisis mode has become the new normal. Facts are facts. It's sad, but true. And you see the need to protect yourself and your family. Let me be clear. One of the best ways to protect your own safety and comfort is to guarantee you're fully ready, even when the power goes out. Nothing feels more vulnerable than that split second when you realize you're sitting in a dangerous blackout. All your critical devices are now on borrowed time. Communications, comfort and protection - all of it is suddenly called into question. **You simply have to have a backup power plan, no matter what your situation or budget.** Well now you can. Because for the **FIRST TIME EVER** you can get a breakthrough NEW solar device... That can harness the limitless and FREE energy from the sun, and that's **_safe to use inside_** because it's fume-free, silent and never needs gasoline to run. But if you want one, you better hurry... Because customers have been practically begging for this product to hit the market. And now that the first batches of units are ready to ship from Utah, USA... these mini solar generators won't be around for long. You're among the first to know about...
# The NEW Patriot Power Sidekick
Finally... a Mini Solar Generator that Never Needs Gas and that Costs Less than an iPhone!
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3o4vvntner51l70mogogiljh3fpooe17ladjpr0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ie6o32c5h2bs) _"I really like how many things the Sidekick can run. I can charge my cell phone and iPad at the same time, run an electric razor, my radio, an electric blanket and so much more. It's so easy to take with you anywhere - very light!"_ _Craig W.
Police Officer
Indiana
October 2020_ Small and mighty, the Patriot Power Sidekick is your personal "portable power plant" that can power your phones, laptops, medical devices, radios and more! You'll also be able to run a toaster oven, a CPAP machine through the night, your TV, radios, GPS devices, lamps, small personal space heaters, fans, a mini fridge, electric blankets... **And you can use it right inside your home, because it's fume-free and SAFE.** You can't say that about a typical generator. Not by a long shot. So you can have the ultimate peace of mind that you and your family will stay connected when disaster strikes.
* $190 in FREE Bonuses
* Silent, Fume-FREE & Safe
* Fast Recharge
* Long-Lasting Battery
* Recharge 2,000 Times!
* Easy to Use
* Completely Portable & Easy to Use!
* Powers Your Favorite Devices
* FREE Portable 40-Watt Solar Panel Included
* and more!

That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: [**The Patriot Power Sidekick
Is An Essential Part of
Your Preparedness Plan!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zu0t5lc2u5c9ehe3kol6r1ukhv40ibikltn13ln0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ie6o32c5h2bs) [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zuv61n1euiki4843rspu91cb5l8bumr04242inb0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ie6o32c5h2bs) **You'll Never Run Out of Juice** _"You can charge your phone 28 times and still have some juice left over. It has no shortage of power. It's very reliable and very good. It's the perfect addition to all of your other 4Patriots products." - Dan W._ [**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvlr6thbstrls798hkg8ndt9cf9jtauu452iltko_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ie6o32c5h2bs)
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmp7fb6gq08in09827f8rjsnu28hcebmtvhrfg38_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ie6o32c5h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Biggest FREEDOM PARTY of 2021!
body:
This is really exciting news. Are you ready to hear it? Turning Point USA is beyond thrilled to announce a brand new event:
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z57fmgej5i413ger5dj7hrqerilknn2be975gnn0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ie6o36clh2bs)
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zo07f4oqiqn148a6tgnssvskhsghjql8isargk7o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ie6o36clh2bs) Hi Fellow American, This is really exciting news. Are you ready to hear it? Turning Point USA is beyond thrilled to announce a _brand new event:_**AmericaFest 2021!** This four-day event will be _the largest conservative movement event in the country_ —and an event like you’ve _never_ seen, featuring dozens of the best and brightest conservative speakers, special musical guests, and non-stop energy and excitement alongside _thousands of like-minded, freedom-loving individuals._ [**TPUSA wants to get thousands of young people to AmericaFest 2021—but we need your help to do it.******](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0i2q7f30escsvocaoar80bh7ktgilah25lidnf0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ie6o36clh2bs) You see, thousands of young conservatives are ready to come to AmericaFest, but, being full-time students with limited resources, they simply don’t have the means to afford the ticket. I’m hoping that as a fellow patriot who loves America and cares about the next generation, you’ll help us meet some of those needs. **Will you help us educate and encourage our future leaders to steer this country in the right direction by**[**making a generous gift right now to TPUSA’s AmericaFest Scholarship Fund**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2moplhiele8mrolp7kj2u71i2281nhaolhp1gb8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ie6o36clh2bs)**[?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zl6veunek5hp764pq7jmotn7o8m2nh4vd0h7gpj8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ie6o36clh2bs) ** [**A contribution of $35 will provide a One-Day Pass to this massive event for a conservative student. A generous gift of $100 will pay for an entire Four-Day Experience for a young conservative.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9qr5k48040nj0vgedtrbe9chd7mcls0bgr7rdoo_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ie6o36clh2bs)
---
[**Give Gift!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zefp211fsmuuij91d5gduhfovrt3ehi2acj45038_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ie6o36clh2bs)
---
This four day celebration of America, of our constitutional rights, and of our freedom is happening this _**December 18-21 in Phoenix, Arizona**_** _._ **If you will be in the Southwest, I hope you’ll consider joining us! And if you’re not able to make it, [**please consider sponsoring a student today**.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z23p624ir5j25336t06d98um754fm6bfpp48983g_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ie6o36clh2bs) **AmericaFest 2021** will be an event unlike any this movement has ever seen—by creating an experience that breaks the traditional norms of a political conference as we continue to****_bridge the gap between politics and entertainment to win America’s culture war._ Guest speakers include: Donald Trump Jr. Senator Ted Cruz Tucker Carlson Candace Owens **And Many More!** Plus, full live concerts by: Dustin Lynch Brantley Gilbert RaeLynn Russell Dickerson **And More Musical Guests!** Plus entertainment, food, and presentations from dozens of conservative organizations. This event will go down in the history books as one of the greatest conservative events in the USA! But to make sure we can execute it to its fullest potential, we need __YOUR__ help to get as many young conservatives in the door as possible. [**Will you please help us do that with a generous Scholarship Contribution of $35, or even $100 today?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zolj91atgu65jq6ggvlenua1519b9ae5qi80ujs8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ie6o36clh2bs)
---
[**Give One-Day Pass**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqfvsjhei3ordtrn6s50ljr18ng1vdof6nshhrp8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ie6o36clh2bs)
---
[**Give Four-Day Experience**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zv05ildvmprk8omh611ps7fotvvso218i8dnkvt0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ie6o36clh2bs)
---
[**Give Another Amount**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4c4skci1hos99uuoneh1cf53v8ne5277l9ij080_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ie6o36clh2bs)
---
I personally know many of our great guest speakers and musical guests very well. Each of them have personally told me they cannot wait to attend this incredible event! All have been working tirelessly to prepare for **AmericaFest 2021** and have promised not to disappoint! _It’s going to be awesome._ Building up this nation and empowering students through education is my life’s work. This event is a culmination of everything I have spent the last decade focusing on— _and so much more._ If you’re able, I hope you’ll join us **December 18-21 in Phoenix, Arizona** —[**and please consider sponsoring one or more students so they can attend this mind-opening, liberty-loving, informing and entertaining experience!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zimlbufg2odjkjlnb4rjftmmgc469gjotmbu7nho_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ie6o36clh2bs)
---
With unbridled excitement, Charlie Kirk Founder, President Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Biggest FREEDOM PARTY of 2021!
body:
This is really exciting news. Are you ready to hear it? Turning Point USA is beyond thrilled to announce a brand new event:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zc5atvcvmlqpte2ea5kb16c0v8ordfmt6mjc3ob0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfcohm6hpn0s9gc5hm8cj26erm9dtmmmpm5dhkcoqjcc5lmpobfd1kmlinccbks3jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0earmcdb4mkqjfdr1coqe1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn48d245p25oh4cdj6eob4stge8oj24no)
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zf2bvvgffeurq6fdjnsvefeqitv6bs53qeb9825o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ieeo74c9h2bs)
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsn7ri7pji1sm445bmoa59g5p5rsokr5osvlg9c8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ieeo74c9h2bs) Hi Fellow American, This is really exciting news. Are you ready to hear it? Turning Point USA is beyond thrilled to announce a _brand new event:_**AmericaFest 2021!** This four-day event will be _the largest conservative movement event in the country_ —and an event like you’ve _never_ seen, featuring dozens of the best and brightest conservative speakers, special musical guests, and non-stop energy and excitement alongside _thousands of like-minded, freedom-loving individuals._ [**TPUSA wants to get thousands of young people to AmericaFest 2021—but we need your help to do it.******](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3vvmtcctghuci3fjrlufdf124i7iuibroj181i8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ieeo74c9h2bs) You see, thousands of young conservatives are ready to come to AmericaFest, but, being full-time students with limited resources, they simply don’t have the means to afford the ticket. I’m hoping that as a fellow patriot who loves America and cares about the next generation, you’ll help us meet some of those needs. **Will you help us educate and encourage our future leaders to steer this country in the right direction by**[**making a generous gift right now to TPUSA’s AmericaFest Scholarship Fund**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcclgj787iac3rind9b8bnfvi9s4dh85vtk1k4o8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ieeo74c9h2bs)**[?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqc4h6sugm9bro07og958ku98jtu489rh2fstuuo_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ieeo74c9h2bs) ** [**A contribution of $35 will provide a One-Day Pass to this massive event for a conservative student. A generous gift of $100 will pay for an entire Four-Day Experience for a young conservative.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztqjm6hd6c3kotej1tmstd3km9i3hlgl1fp7qopo_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ieeo74c9h2bs)
---
[**Give Gift!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z76bv05cro5d8ejr3mmllgn4railrequ7u7f6p78_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ieeo74c9h2bs)
---
This four day celebration of America, of our constitutional rights, and of our freedom is happening this _**December 18-21 in Phoenix, Arizona**_** _._ **If you will be in the Southwest, I hope you’ll consider joining us! And if you’re not able to make it, [**please consider sponsoring a student today**.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zi40rntpb5cljddplbmnoi3pp1jqkl3qqslv7fog_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ieeo74c9h2bs) **AmericaFest 2021** will be an event unlike any this movement has ever seen—by creating an experience that breaks the traditional norms of a political conference as we continue to****_bridge the gap between politics and entertainment to win America’s culture war._ Guest speakers include: Donald Trump Jr. Senator Ted Cruz Tucker Carlson Candace Owens **And Many More!** Plus, full live concerts by: Dustin Lynch Brantley Gilbert RaeLynn Russell Dickerson **And More Musical Guests!** Plus entertainment, food, and presentations from dozens of conservative organizations. This event will go down in the history books as one of the greatest conservative events in the USA! But to make sure we can execute it to its fullest potential, we need __YOUR__ help to get as many young conservatives in the door as possible. [**Will you please help us do that with a generous Scholarship Contribution of $35, or even $100 today?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z14c2c61f2ep8t4h0ti1ebd773rr462au472b0bg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ieeo74c9h2bs)
---
[**Give One-Day Pass**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z770ve271botan1q54fevu4t59j16ls1h9dq0e38_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ieeo74c9h2bs)
---
[**Give Four-Day Experience**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zu7c17fkjo04q46mqof4n3c9equsbmioqfh170ng_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ieeo74c9h2bs)
---
[**Give Another Amount**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn2pqa5gs8k1lkqi7qqtip0f2l4lo9na1s71ihi8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ieeo74c9h2bs)
---
I personally know many of our great guest speakers and musical guests very well. Each of them have personally told me they cannot wait to attend this incredible event! All have been working tirelessly to prepare for **AmericaFest 2021** and have promised not to disappoint! _It’s going to be awesome._ Building up this nation and empowering students through education is my life’s work. This event is a culmination of everything I have spent the last decade focusing on— _and so much more._ If you’re able, I hope you’ll join us **December 18-21 in Phoenix, Arizona** —[**and please consider sponsoring one or more students so they can attend this mind-opening, liberty-loving, informing and entertaining experience!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztd3c3rcdm8l2aujgntj2qqpi3tnosdvlq3lifao_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ieeo74c9h2bs)
---
With unbridled excitement, Charlie Kirk Founder, President Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, [please use this preferences page](http://e.goppresidential.com/prefs/9z2zu47jrjblc65hdjggrn6iod0gnoj69ununu2jgfg).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjd4vqm3k32q71glo7cdoir4tgedebsm4t5uq3o8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ieeo74c9h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: American Defense News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z15f3v0bbemvkrgjkgq96o079tv6a9lasate1eo8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbr78c3j6gq7fdhjeeor2sr36jhbeptgm3j63d1nchr6ctdgcqprddj0s1p6acdn6v970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj661pbbcj0etgmcs9gmdiefc5lclp238h1e8he4933cpjm2p74sdh69oh5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3jlote2gmfk75camfr3ebtevel61tvvfkbsdfa8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ie9or2cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvieigk33eeg168pebjgstkk4prdt0inpfe4nnu0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ie9or2cjh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z63cei5cr89sro3one68tnirrue67urrv77jfe90_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ie9or2cjh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: 4Patriots
subject: A solar generator... worth its weight in GOLD
body:
The little workhorse of a generator is so popular. We even had a waiting list last time we sold out – thousands of names...
[View this message in your browser](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zdksq3l7h4mlkgffvq71ca9uetmtdhjm6fs48m80_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkorr7djl69pn8cbkmdqj6drh6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf9djnchrb1c3465rm2oj5e2qn1plle4qm3dtgc3i64t5k6dg74t33eph34t1j6urt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0earmcdb4mkqefcjicoo71cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn48d245p25oh4cdj6eob4sjhm4pj24no)

Jim and his family lost power recently. Luckily for Jim and his loved ones, he was prepared with a Patriot Power Generator - a "next generation" solar generator that's powerful, portable, safe, silent, and 100% no fumes. _**Jim declares that this 1-of-a-kind generator is "worth its weight in GOLD."**_ **[See the #1 solar generator in action (and get one before they're gone)](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zhj97pk24nhlm2dclt6hnhgk9ekk6ao18ie4lh5o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ie9or2cph2bs)** Here's what happened to Jim, and how he "powered through" when his world went dark... _" Last Friday we had a freak lightning storm hit taking down the local power. The Electric Co. had no estimate as to when the power would be back up._ _I pulled out my Patriot Power Generator and immediately connected my fridge, a light, and 4 cell phones and kept them charged._ _The power was restored after 6 hours. I left the Patriot Power Generator running to see how far it would go. It ran for another 7 hours before the low charge alarm started sounding._ _My family was very impressed. Thank you for a wonderful, easy to use product. "_ With unpredictable weather going on all across the country, it might be time to ask yourself if you're prepared to handle a blackout like Jim. Because for the first time in months (and after selling out multiple times in a row) we have the Patriot Power Generator, our most in-demand product, back in stock. The little workhorse of a generator is so popular... **We even had a waiting list last time we sold out - __thousands__ of names long.** You'll have more than enough robust power for your phones, tablets, laptops, small appliances, medical devices, lights, and more (including the ability to cycle your fridge and freezer). The Patriot Power Generator weighs a mere 38 pounds and can go just about anywhere. Plus, there's no dangerous fossil fuels or fumes to worry about. No noise to attract unwanted attention from looters or criminals. No flammable propane to fret about, either. Your generator arrives fully assembled and charged, too. So you can start using it right away. It's simple to operate, too - no complicated instructions to fuss over. And, you don't have to wait for an emergency to test it out. Take it on your next outdoor adventure or tailgate party. The ways you can enjoy your generator are unlimited. So if want to get your hands on one, you'll need to jump on this and get yours today. You'll sleep better at night... knowing you're prepared if the power goes out. **[>> See what all the hoopla is about, and to get your own Patriot Power Generator](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zlj4d41hr1raivve99nijn3k7cig5f17subn2s2g_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5ie9or2cph2bs)**

Luckily for Jim and his loved ones, he was prepared with a Patriot Power Generator - a "next generation" solar generator that's powerful, portable, safe, silent, and 100% no fumes. Jim declares that this 1-of-a-kind generator is "worth its weight in GOLD." Here's what happened to Jim, and how he "powered through" when his world went dark... " Last Friday we had a freak lightning storm hit taking down the local power. The Electric Co. had no estimate as to when the power would be back up. I pulled out my Patriot Power Generator and immediately connected my fridge, a light, and 4 cell phones and kept them charged. The power was restored after 6 hours. I left the Patriot Power Generator running to see how far it would go. It ran for another 7 hours before the low charge alarm started sounding. My family was very impressed. Thank you for a wonderful, easy to use product. " With unpredictable weather going on all across the country, it might be time to ask yourself if you're prepared to handle a blackout like Jim. Because for the first time in months (and after selling out multiple times in a row) we have the Patriot Power Generator, our most in-demand product, back in stock. The little workhorse of a generator is so popular... We even had a waiting list last time we sold out - thousands of names long. You'll have more than enough robust power for your phones, tablets, laptops, small appliances, medical devices, lights, and more (including the ability to cycle your fridge and freezer). The Patriot Power Generator weighs a mere 38 pounds and can go just about anywhere. Plus, there's no dangerous fossil fuels or fumes to worry about. No noise to attract unwanted attention from looters or criminals. No flammable propane to fret about, either. Your generator arrives fully assembled and charged, too. So you can start using it right away. It's simple to operate, too - no complicated instructions to fuss over. And, you don't have to wait for an emergency to test it out. Take it on your next outdoor adventure or tailgate party. The ways you can enjoy your generator are unlimited. So if want to get your hands on one, you'll need to jump on this and get yours today. You'll sleep better at night... knowing you're prepared if the power goes out. name: Marco Rubio
subject: Hey 👋
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
My race in Florida will be the most closely watched race in the entire country.
|
---
| | | | Peter,

My race in Florida will be the most closely watched race in the entire country. Here's a play-by-play of what is going on in the fight for the Senate and for Trump's Legacy:

**In just the past few months:**
* Fox News has said my race could be the most expensive ever.
* CNN continues to move my race up on their list of Top 10 seats most likely to flip.
* The DNC and DCCC outraised their Republican counterparts in July.
* My opponent raised $4.6 million in Quarter 2 while spending over $2.2 million in Facebook ads since the launch of her campaign.
* My opponent raised $8.4 million and I was outraised AGAIN last quarter.

**In the last 24 hours since I last emailed you:**
* My liberal opponent has spent almost $20,000 more on ads.

**And by the time you have read this far into the email: **
* A Democrat has already donated $10 to flip the Senate and reverse everything we built under President Trump.

This is what we are up against, Peter. **[To hold our own against the Democrats, will you donate $10 of your own to fight back against the Left?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58828064:6Jxe342ON:m:1:3253819041:F407D46D716154FD94551A6496C9EC5D:r "To hold our own

Hello! My name is Sam over at Republican HQ. I have a quick question that I was hoping to get your opinion on. [**Right now my data is incomplete -- could you spare ten seconds to answer this one question?**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2wj66-1lqvu-4qqlpo3/)
As I’m sure you’ve heard, my favorite President -- Donald J. Trump -- is launching a brand new social media app. I’m so excited to sign up! But when I was combing through the thousands of Patriots who pledged to join, **I was disappointed to see your name not on our official list...**
I know you’re busy but could you do me a favor and respond in the next 10 minutes? _I promise to not bug you again! So will you join?_
**[Yes: I Stand With Trump >>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2wj66-1lqvv-4qqlpo4/)**
**[No: I Don’t Support Trump >>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2wj66-1lqvw-4qqlpo5/)**
President Trump is building his very own platform to stop Big Tech from controlling what we can and can’t see... censoring strong Conservative voices... and blacklisting content they don’t agree with.... _And the Liberals are desperate to stop him._
**Thousands have already signed a petition to BAN his app from the Apple and Google app stores -- they’ll do ANYTHING to stop him.**
President Trump needs to know we have his back.
[**So would you join? I’ll be on the lookout for your answer in 10 minutes from now.**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2wj66-1lqvx-4qqlpo6/)
Thanks for all you do.
\-- Sam

name: Wendy Rittenhouse
subject: NOT GUILTY.
body:
Kyle was just ACQUITTED and is now officially FREE! [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8043%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=DAswgIhxVQBuwSLap0mmvg&sysid=1)
| | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18951%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tXQl1ICgUT8CxsVXAGhXQg&sysid=1)
---
|
---
Friend,

**Kyle was just ACQUITTED and is now officially FREE!**

This was a victory for the truth, for justice, and for every American's God-given and unalienable right of self-defense.

We are so overcome with emotion, and as hard as that was, we are thankful.

We are thankful for the millions of Americans who stood with Kyle from the start.

We are thankful for the many others who watched the trial with an open mind, realized that they had been lied to for a year and a half, and spoke out.

And we are thankful to the jury which put aside bias, considered the facts, and came to the right decision.

Now, we will try to return to something that resembles a normal life - **however that requires one more major push to settle our case-related debts and pay off what we hope will be our final legal bills.**

**[So please, take all that positive energy I know you're feeling and make an urgent donation to help us close this very ugly chapter in our lives.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18952%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mijWZ3OrMN573YVD2nkzWg&sysid=1)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18954%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SZrIWoXKM6t13zLoI47Yvg&sysid=1)
|
---
Any funds left over will be transferred into Kyle's scholarship fund so that he'll be able to graduate from college debt-free.

You'll be hearing from us again, but for now, and from the bottom of our hearts - thank you. Thank you. Thank you.

With love,

Wendy Rittenhouse
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18954%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SZrIWoXKM6t13zLoI47Yvg&sysid=1)

clean_body: Kyle was just ACQUITTED and is now officially FREE! | | | | | Friend, Kyle was just ACQUITTED and is now officially FREE! This was a victory for the truth, for justice, and for every American's God-given and unalienable right of self-defense. We are so overcome with emotion, and as hard as that was, we are thankful. We are thankful for the millions of Americans who stood with Kyle from the start. We are thankful for the many others who watched the trial with an open mind, realized that they had been lied to for a year and a half, and spoke out. And we are thankful to the jury which put aside bias, considered the facts, and came to the right decision. Now, we will try to return to something that resembles a normal life - however that requires one more major push to settle our case-related debts and pay off what we hope will be our final legal bills. | | Any funds left over will be transferred into Kyle's scholarship fund so that he'll be able to graduate from college debt-free. You'll be hearing from us again, but for now, and from the bottom of our hearts - thank you. Thank you. Thank you. With love, Wendy Rittenhouse | | | | Copyright(C) 2021 Free Kyle USA, All rights reserved. Free Kyle USA PO Box 5322 Reno, NV 89513 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

I want to talk to you about my friend and colleague, Elaine Luria. Elaine is running in one of the most competitive swing districts in the country. She is one of the National Republican Congressional Committee's top targets in 2022. And she is up against several Republicans fundraising off of, and otherwise exploiting, Trump’s Big Lie. We can’t let them succeed. **In order to fend off these extremist opponents, Elaine has a crucial fundraising deadline at the end of the month – [will you help her overcome these obstacles by chipping in $25 or whatever you can to her campaign right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38856425/317329589/1017468089?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_211120_FR_EOM1Schiff_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjNiZmU1MS1kMzRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tv_z7-HCg6Xx44CY3yJIFlQLg5nBL3lSihQC88Q8XWE=)** | | | [Chip in »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38856427/317329591/1017468089?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_211120_FR_EOM1Schiff_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjNiZmU1MS1kMzRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tv_z7-HCg6Xx44CY3yJIFlQLg5nBL3lSihQC88Q8XWE=)

I have had the pleasure of working with Elaine in Congress for many years. She’s always willing to go the extra mile to get things done, to deliver, and she always puts her constituents first. She’s smart and asks the right questions.
Elaine has been a critical voice in Congress for keeping our elections fair and protecting our democracy – much to the chagrin of Republicans who want nothing more than to defeat her.
Trust me, I know the feeling.
The good news is that Elaine isn’t afraid to stand up to Republicans. To demand truth and accountability. And she’s certainly not going to let GOP outside spending defeat her. Last cycle, national Republicans spent _$3 million_ trying to unseat her, but she stood strong and **won**.
We will need to stand up to even stronger forces this time around. And Elaine needs your help to get the job done. clean_body: | | = Folks, Congressman Adam Schiff here. I want to talk to you about my friend and colleague, Elaine Luria. Elaine is running in one of the most competitive swing districts in the country. She is one of the National Republican Congressional Committee's top targets in 2022. And she is up against several Republicans fundraising off of, and otherwise exploiting, Trump’s Big Lie. We can’t let them succeed. In order to fend off these extremist opponents, Elaine has a crucial fundraising deadline at the end of the month – = | | | = I have had the pleasure of working with Elaine in Congress for many years. She’s always willing to go the extra mile to get things done, to deliver, and she always puts her constituents first. She’s smart and asks the right questions. Elaine has been a critical voice in Congress for keeping our elections fair and protecting our democracy – much to the chagrin of Republicans who want nothing more than to defeat her. Trust me, I know the feeling. The good news is that Elaine isn’t afraid to stand up to Republicans. To demand truth and accountability. And she’s certainly not going to let GOP outside spending defeat her. Last cycle, national Republicans spent $3 million trying to unseat her, but she stood strong and won. We will need to stand up to even stronger forces this time around. And Elaine needs your help to get the job done. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks for standing with her. — Congressman Adam Schiff | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. Hi Peter, I just wanted to spell out, in black and white, what your very first donation of $5 would do for this campaign.
When you donate $5, it’s more office supplies we can get to staff who are contacting voters and spreading our message. It’s the on-the-ground stuff campaigns _need_ to be successful.
When you donate $10, it means gas in the tanks of our organizers who are rallying New York voters across the state. It means more yard signs to capitalize on the enthusiasm behind this historic campaign. It means research, polling, and data to run a sophisticated operation.
And most importantly, Peter, whether or not you donate $5 decides whether Letitia can reach the voters she needs to – whether she has the resources to connect with the voters in the way only she knows how to.

But right now, we’re still falling short of our $5,000 goal: **[So before 11:59 p.m., will you chip in whatever you can spare to fund the resources we need to knock on doors, take to the streets, and reach as many New Yorkers as possible with Letitia’s vision for a more just, equal, and progressive New York?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38857023/317332264/1687198019?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk170-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTNiZjMwNC1kNDRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9uVPF-jhaRvN-A-IGjDJs6hflur8bFzYJqQvtE0iM3M=)**

subject: NEW 8-Pound Solar Generator is HERE
body:
Navy SEAL tested: see it in action!
_Sponsored message_
# "Weird" 8-Pound Solar Device
Could Save Your Life in a
Dangerous Blackout
**[NEW] #1 Requested Item of 2021 -
Introductory Stock Extremely Limited** [**➡ Navy SEAL tested: see it in action!**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2ze1ou45a7d6npjj6c27em9a87cipen3epenqhcv0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7clg6cpb6cph2bs) [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zenfrtufdds7djnbk4hb09tusgger25do3dj7a1o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7clg6cpb6cph2bs) [**> > Video: This mini solar generator powers devices and weighs less than a housecat**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z59b6ipo4gd228rfl1tsc55duolemcf2s3l7ocjo_rp22sh2s8i66pj7clg6cpb6cph2bs) Hello my fellow Patriots. I'm Cade Courtley, former Navy SEAL Platoon Commander, sniper, and author of the _SEAL Survival Guide._ If 2020 has taught us anything... it's not IF you need a backup plan... **it's WHEN**. A deadly pandemic, blackouts sweeping the nation, wildfires, hurricanes, social unrest and crumbling power grids. Crisis mode has become the new normal. Facts are facts. It's sad, but true. And you see the need to protect yourself and your family. Let me be clear. One of the best ways to protect your own safety and comfort is to guarantee you're fully ready, even when the power goes out. name: Wendy Rittenhouse
subject: FREE!
body:
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58833294:J1L2P42NU:m:1:3298722022:F8D48B873B94ACDF9ED87FA1929CED2F:r)
---
|
---
Peter,

**Kyle was just ACQUITTED and is now officially FREE!**

This was a victory for the truth, for justice, and for every American's God-given and unalienable right of self-defense.

We are so overcome with emotion, and as hard as that was, we are thankful.

We are thankful for the millions of Americans who stood with Kyle from the start.

We are thankful for the many others who watched the trial with an open mind, realized that they had been lied to for a year and a half, and spoke out.

And we are thankful to the jury which put aside bias, considered the facts, and came to the right decision.

Now, we will try to return to something that resembles a normal life, **however that requires one more major push to settle our case-related debts and pay off what we hope will be our final legal bills.**

**[So please, take all that positive energy I know you're feeling and make an urgent donation to help us close this very ugly chapter in our lives.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58833294:J1L2P42NU:m:1:3298722022:F8D48B873B94ACDF9ED87FA1929CED2F:r)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58833294:J1L2P42NU:m:1:3298722022:F8D48B873B94ACDF9ED87FA1929CED2F:r)
|
---
Any funds left over will be transferred into Kyle's scholarship fund so that he'll be able to graduate from college debt-free.

You'll be hearing from us again, but for now, and from the bottom of our hearts, thank you. Thank you. Thank you.

With love,

Wendy Rittenhouse
|

name: Secretary Mike Pompeo
subject: China is at it again
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
|
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58833303:6cH9f42NM:m:1:3298722022:A3853C2C9DB55D0FC68D91F8669D3186:r)
---
Did you see this story?

---
| **" China's military uses target shaped like US aircraft carrier group"**

Fox News, 11/9/21
---

This follows on the news that China is rapidly expanding its nuclear arsenal to include more warheads.

Yet, the Biden Administration continues to show weakness time and time again. China isn't just a competitor. China is our adversary. _**We must take the threat China poses to global security seriously.**_

During the Trump Administration, we were tough on China. They knew we were serious. We exerted economic pressure that worked, and we never hesitated to call Xi Jinping and the Chinese Communist Party out for their egregious actions.

The tools are available to combat China. _**We simply need leaders who are prepared to use them.**_

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58833303:6cH9f42NM:m:1:3298722022:A3853C2C9DB55D0FC68D91F8669D3186:r)
---

The Biden Administration cannot continue to show weakness when it comes to China and our other adversaries. They sense the weakness and grow even more emboldened to act out against U.S. interests.

That's why we MUST demand Joe Biden and Democrats in Congress hold China accountable. _**Will you chip in to help us elect more strong conservatives who will stand up to China?**_

---
| | [STAND UP TO CHINA](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58833303:6cH9f42NM:m:1:3298722022:A3853C2C9DB55D0FC68D91F8669D3186:r)
---

China is not our friend. The sooner the Biden Administration accepts this, the safer Americans will be.

Never Give An Inch,
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58833303:6cH9f42NM:m:1:3298722022:A3853C2C9DB55D0FC68D91F8669D3186:r)
---
Mike Pompeo
70th Secretary of State
---

---

Personal note from Mike Pompeo:

I need your help if we are going to _**WIN BIG**_ for Republicans in the upcoming elections.

I've spent my life fighting for our American values, and I'm keeping that fight alive by supporting principled conservative candidates all across the country. _**[Will you chip in to help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58833303:6cH9f42NM:m:1:3298722022:A3853C2C9DB55D0FC68D91F8669D3186:r "Will you chip in to
help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?")**_

Thanks again for all that you do, and let's keep up the good work!

-Mike

We simply need leaders who are prepared to use them. | The Biden Administration cannot continue to show weakness when it comes to China and our other adversaries. They sense the weakness and grow even more emboldened to act out against U.S. interests. That's why we MUST demand Joe Biden and Democrats in Congress hold China accountable. Will you chip in to help us elect more strong conservatives who will stand up to China? | | China is not our friend. The sooner the Biden Administration accepts this, the safer Americans will be. Never Give An Inch, | Mike Pompeo 70th Secretary of State | | Help Champion American Values: Text CHAMPION to 29910 | "Mike Pompeo is Calling on All Conservatives" Personal note from Mike Pompeo: I need your help if we are going to WIN BIG for Republicans in the upcoming elections. I've spent my life fighting for our American values, and I'm keeping that fight alive by supporting principled conservative candidates all across the country. "Will you chip in to help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?" Thanks again for all that you do, and let's keep up the good work! -Mike | | | "DONATE NOW" Make sure you never miss an update from Mike Pompeo and CAVPAC! name: Patriot Advantage on Behalf of Hillsdale College
subject: Battle Plan Survey
body:
Please view this message from our sponsor[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58833371:64usz42Nt:m:1:3299561967:6986795FE2EA7DE83857AF31472C220B:r) Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College's [**RECLAIM AMERICA 'S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58833371:64usz42Nt:m:1:3299561967:6986795FE2EA7DE83857AF31472C220B:r) My name is Bill Gray, and I'm the associate vice president of national donor outreach at Hillsdale College. It's my responsibility to invite like-minded conservatives (like you!) to support Hillsdale. **I don 't use the word "battle" lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt.** It's clear to me that we are in a fight for the future of our nation--a fight against progressives who are targeting our youngest citizens. These so-called "progressives" seek to undermine traditional patriotism and ultimately transform American government and society. _The New York Times'_ recent "1619 Project" is the prime example of this effort to inject into the minds of our youngest citizens a biased distortion of our nation's history. If you haven't heard, the "1619 Project" places the founding of America in 1619, when the first slave arrived in Jamestown, rather than in 1776 when the Declaration of Independence proclaimed that "all men are created equal" and endowed by God with "unalienable rights." **" Our democracy's founding ideals," the "1619 Project" proclaims, "were false when they were written."** Outrageous! _The New York Times '_ stated goal with the "1619 Project" is to influence the curricula of K-12 schools nationwide. They teach young people that slavery--not freedom--is and always will be the central and defining idea of the American experience, making our country irredeemable. This project has garnered universal acclaim from the news media. In fact, the lead essayist just won a Pulitzer Prize! There are even talks about making the "1619 Project" into a feature film. **Given popular and widespread efforts like these, we should not be surprised that there is a decreasing sense of patriotism among younger Americans --and an increasing tendency to embrace socialism and other liberty-destroying ideas.** Education has become a battleground, and reviving a proper understanding of American history and government, especially among younger citizens, must be our** _most urgent priority._** Hillsdale College is at the forefront of this effort. **We are actively engaging the Left on the battlefield of education. And I need your help to make this effort even more effective.** Hillsdale is America's most powerful advocate for intelligent and informed patriotism--our best defense against the loss of our liberty and insidious beliefs like socialism. We do this on our Michigan campus, with an undergraduate and graduate student body of over 1,500, and through education that reaches and teaches millions of citizens each year on behalf of liberty. And in response to new efforts such as the media-driven "1619 Project" that seek to turn the next generation of citizens against the principles of the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution, Hillsdale must expand this critical work--especially in 2020. As I said before, to fight and win this battle, Hillsdale needs your help right away. The FIRST step I need you to take right now is to complete the **RECLAIM AMERICA 'S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**. This national project seeks to make it clear that people in your state and nationwide still revere our founding principles of liberty, and refuse to let them be corrupted by those who hold America in contempt. **As _The New York Times '_ efforts make clear, powerful forces vehemently oppose this view of America, and their assault on our glorious history is taking place before our very eyes. ** _Our ongoing response, rooted in genuine learning, and proven to reach millions of citizens, must be escalated as quickly as possible._ And if, upon completing your Battle Plan, you feel a strong connection to Hillsdale's work, then I urge you to please consider including a generous tax-deductible gift in support of expanding these efforts on behalf of liberty. Based on the costs of Hillsdale's multiple educational programs--which I will outline fo**r you shortly --it has been determined that to fully implement this [RECLAIM AMERICA'S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58833371:64usz42Nt:m:1:3299561967:6986795FE2EA7DE83857AF31472C220B:r)** for maximum impact, Hillsdale College must raise at least $1,016,700 within the next month. And unlike most colleges and universities that rely on federal funding and subsidies, EVERY PENNY of funding for Hillsdale's educational outreach comes from the voluntary support of intelligent patriots like you. This is because Hillsdale College refuses EVEN ONE PENNY of state or federal taxpayer funding--even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. That's so important, I need to say it again--Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding! **In this way, Hillsdale remains truly independent, avoiding unconstitutional regulations that would violate the College 's educational mission.** Hillsdale has built national support from hundreds of thousands of citizens. These intelligent patriots know that liberty in America is in trouble thanks to progressive control of our schools and institutions. And these citizens are determined to preserve our liberty--as I believe you are. These supporters give what they can, when they can--gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more ... because they understand that every dollar given goes to reaching and teaching millions of people--including our nation's youth--with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution. The gift you choose to give today will determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the **[RECLAIM AMERICA'S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58833371:64usz42Nt:m:1:3299561967:6986795FE2EA7DE83857AF31472C220B:r)** And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale's proven programs and publications that are educating millions of Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale's plan for your review and feedback: **BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical Concerns of Everyday Americans** I mentioned that our network of supporters that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong--such a broad base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours) that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible. **Your participation today will allow Hillsdale to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them where they 're needed most, on the areas of concern that matter most to the American people.** You were selected to be part of this effort based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen America, AND because of Hillsdale's confidence that you will respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts to restore the Constitution. I'm counting on and very much looking forward to your survey response! **BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive Teaching in America 's Schools** In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale's proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead important conversations surrounding America's history and founding principles--AND ask what YOU think about these efforts. And make no mistake--Hillsdale is uniquely qualified to drive this effort. Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus--they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses _free of charge_ , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the courses on social media and online to reach large audiences, especially younger Americans. The response has been tremendous--over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of our online courses. Do you think this is an effective means of reaching and teaching millions of Americans on behalf of liberty? We even have an online course that directly counters _The New York Times '_ "1619 Project." This free course is called **" The Great American Story: A Land of Hope"** and presents an unbiased and complete account of America's past. To me this is a great example of why these free courses are needed: They safeguard the country, through education, against the damage to liberty inflicted by the Left. And what do you think about sending a free monthly digest of liberty, to millions of people? This newsletter is called _Imprimis_ , and it features speeches delivered at Hillsdale events by prominent scholars, journalists, and policymakers, focused on political, economic, historic, and cultural topics from a constitutional viewpoint. _Imprimis_ is America's most widely-circulated publication in support of liberty, reaching more households and businesses than either the _Wall Street Journal_ or the "fake news" _New York Times_. Issues covering topics such as "Rediscovering the Wisdom of American History" and "Shall We Defend our Common History?" set _Imprimis_ apart. The publication is as a powerful counterbalance to the biased media outlets that pursue narrow, ideologically driven distortions of history. (If you're not yet an _Imprimis_ subscriber, we'll be happy to sign you up as soon as we hear from you.) **BATTLE PLAN POINT #3: Restore Excellence to K-12 Schools** In this section we explore how Hillsdale College is reshaping American K-12 education, especially through our Barney Charter School Initiative, which helps launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, teaching thousands of K-12 students. These schools all have a strong civics curriculum. The curriculum provides young Americans with a solid grounding in our nation's history, our limited constitutional government, and economics. In doing so, Hillsdale provides communities with a practical model of how schools can best serve students and the country. **Sustained by our supporters, Hillsdale 's Barney Charter School Initiative has assisted in the founding of more than 20 classical K-12 charter schools in 11 states, with approximately 12,000 students enrolled. And more of these K-12 schools are opening each year.** Do you support this effort to set a new standard for K-12 education and give young Americans a proper education? Hillsdale also launched a new initiative to send pocket Constitutions to thousands of elementary and junior high schools. We ship them with a promise to send as many pocket Constitutions as their schools need. **The response has been astounding.** We've now sent out more than 500,000 pocket Constitutions across the country, and we receive more requests every week. Does this effort to restore the Constitution to K-12 schools sound like a good idea to you? As you select your answers, I believe you will find that Hillsdale's educational outreach is a powerful way to confront and ultimately overcome the progressive forces that seek to instill in young people the ruinous idea that America stands for slavery, not freedom. I know you love this country, and I hope you will partner with Hillsdale in defending America through education--education aimed at citizens of all ages nationwide. The first step is getting your thoughts on our **[RECLAIM AMERICA'S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58833371:64usz42Nt:m:1:3299561967:6986795FE2EA7DE83857AF31472C220B:r)**
With your response you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of citizen opinion that can help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views and concerns of mainstream Americans--views that we can make available to policymakers and opinion leaders when we discuss the Left's agenda, and use to strengthen our educational outreach efforts. What Hillsdale needs now is YOU--your thoughtful input on the work we're doing, and your generous support to expand our work. **So please complete the[Battle Plan Survey](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58833371:64usz42Nt:m:1:3299561967:6986795FE2EA7DE83857AF31472C220B:r) today.** When you give to Hillsdale and share your opinions, you will join a dedicated and growing team of intelligent patriots, who always step up when the time comes to defend America against the progressives' attack on American history and liberty. Thank you for your commitment to liberty in America. Warm regards,
Bill Gray
Assoc. Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S**. We are in a battle for the future of America, because the Left is determined to transform our country ... by fundamentally changing how history is taught to young people. Education is the battlefield, and Hillsdale College urgently needs you standing with us to support and sustain our efforts. With your help, we can continue to reach and teach millions of citizens of all ages, especially the youngest Americans, with the principles of liberty underlying the Constitution. Please complete **[RECLAIM AMERICA'S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58833371:64usz42Nt:m:1:3299561967:6986795FE2EA7DE83857AF31472C220B:r)** to shape Hillsdale College's defense of America against the progressive assault on history. Your response is needed within five days so we can finalize plans to expand our educational outreach on behalf of liberty.
---
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system October 25, 2021.
For more information [click here](http://email.vervemail.com/p/i64usz42Nt). [Update your preferences](http://email.vervemail.com/p/o64usz42Nt)

name: Carole King
subject: Join me in supporting Maggie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Hi friend, I first met Maggie Hassan when she was running for the New Hampshire State Senate in 2004. Granite Staters saw how hard she worked and how much she cared about the issues that kept them up at night—and she won that race! **Granite Staters know a leader when they see one. They subsequently elected Maggie to serve as New Hampshire’s governor and then U.S. Senator.** Voters in New Hampshire are famously independent. name: Wendy Rittenhouse
subject: NOT GUILTY.
body:
Kyle was just ACQUITTED and is now officially FREE! This was a victory for the truth, for justice, and for every American's God
_Sponsored message_
| | | | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z1ib0764v8pi8qt6h8bh66humtm91ph48j6askgg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7clg66o73cph2bs)
---
|
---
Friend,

**Kyle was just ACQUITTED and is now officially FREE!**

This was a victory for the truth, for justice, and for every American's God-given and unalienable right of self-defense.

We are so overcome with emotion, and as hard as that was, we are thankful.

We are thankful for the millions of Americans who stood with Kyle from the start.

We are thankful for the many others who watched the trial with an open mind, realized that they had been lied to for a year and a half, and spoke out.

And we are thankful to the jury which put aside bias, considered the facts, and came to the right decision.

Now, we will try to return to something that resembles a normal life – **however that requires one more major push to settle our case-related debts and pay off what we hope will be our final legal bills.**

**[So please, take all that positive energy I know you're feeling and make an urgent donation to help us close this very ugly chapter in our lives.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2ztqf6rfc31s635832tv6ckfq6hooq73t085ja3oo_rp22sh2s8i66pj7clg66o73cph2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z7i86u47c10vvau96fs7v3249ripfigisedsbck8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7clg66o73cph2bs)
|
---
Any funds left over will be transferred into Kyle's scholarship fund so that he'll be able to graduate from college debt-free.

You'll be hearing from us again, but for now, and from the bottom of our hearts – thank you. Thank you. Thank you.

With love,

Wendy Rittenhouse
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z99k4amhes8k65c6atnhkm7mdvk702t672f4pan8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7clg66o73cph2bs)

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Two problems: Ted Cruz and Josh Hawley
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=OASI5kcpDoy14L%2FPknmLn0mimPRzldvL&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend: As you very well know, former President Donald Trump and the cronies he installed throughout our federal government did whatever they could to decimate our democratic institutions. From the judiciary to the State Department, the twice-impeached president installed loyalists who not only demoralized career staff, but utterly desecrated the integrity of our democracy.
**Since voters elected Democrats in Congress - and President Joe Biden - with a mandate to fix the disaster of the last four years, we have had an unprecedented opportunity to restore faith in our government and _reinforce_ the strength of our democratic institutions.**
There's just one problem. Two problems, really - two problematic, obstructionist senators: Ted Cruz (R-TX) and Josh Hawley (R-MO). They are manipulating Senate procedure to single-handedly hold up President Biden's crucial judicial, diplomatic, and national security appointments. **In doing so, they are acting as Trump flunkies, carrying forth the former President 's obstruction and jeopardizing the safety, security, and effectiveness of our government.**
Senate precedent has dictated that non-controversial nominees of the President not be held up by arcane procedure. But Senators like Ted Cruz and Josh Hawley don't care about democratic norms. Their sole focus is to reimagine our government in the image of the corrupt man they take orders from: Donald Trump. **I am counting on this grassroots team to join me in holding them accountable.**
**[Before midnight tonight, I need 650 grassroots activists to add their names to CONDEMN Ted Cruz and Josh Hawley for their obstructionist behavior. Please, will you speak out right now?](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-nominations-1121?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1101-su-nd)**
The vast majority of Republican senators have done nothing to help move our country forward over the last year. In fact, they are doing worse than nothing: They are using their positions and power to try to obstruct progress that the American people urgently want and need. Even worse, they are putting our diplomacy, national security, and judicial branch on thin ice. I won't stand for it. I'll fight back at every step. Thanks for fighting with me.
Dick
[ Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1101-su-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=yNfgofwKu8Kv%2FaI6zP8mbaJnVVgfeeQO&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
