name: Valerie Foushee
subject: Announcement: I’m running for Congress!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/uX50004l2hATUjDioA0gsKfdaQ1DRLVqXz3W5RewpOg=/F9DOTmXadGnS6UfIPfwI7YUh6EMKJg6dh7Gdkt5DsvI=?refcode=BLU-VFC-20211121-1-EM)
---
| Peter,

My name is Valerie Foushee. I was born in Orange County, North Carolina, and have lived here for my entire life. [_**Now, I 'm running to represent my community in the U.S. House of Representatives.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/uX50004l2hATUjDioA0gsKfdaQ1DRLVqXz3W5RewpOg=/F9DOTmXadGnS6UfIPfwI7YUh6EMKJg6dh7Gdkt5DsvI=?refcode=BLU-VFC-20211121-1-EM)
---
| [SUPPORT OUR CAMPAIGN ](https://act.myngp.com/el/uX50004l2hATUjDioA0gsKfdaQ1DRLVqXz3W5RewpOg=/F9DOTmXadGnS6UfIPfwI7YUh6EMKJg6dh7Gdkt5DsvI=?refcode=BLU-VFC-20211121-1-EM)
---
It wasn't always easy for me growing up. I was the oldest of six children and was born to two teenage parents. I watched my parents work multiple jobs to make ends meet and attended segregated schools until sixth grade. **But even with these challenges, my parents instilled in me the importance of community, hard work, service to your neighbors, and education.** These values still shape who I am today.

While in high school, I worked as a church secretary, a clerk at a recreation center, and at UNC Hospitals, delivering food trays to patients to save for college. High school was also where I met my partner for life, Stan. We dated all through high school and have been married for 44 years -- we also raised two wonderful sons together! I worked hard to attend the University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill (go Tar Heels!), and this educational background set me up for a **lifetime commitment to service.**

As a parent to young children in the Chapel Hill-Carrboro City schools system, I would leave work at the Chapel Hill Police Department at 7:00 a.m. to volunteer in my children's classrooms until 9:00 a.m. Through that volunteer service, I learned that kids, especially black and brown kids, could use another champion on the School Board who was always looking out for them and their success. **So I ran, and I won.**

Over the next twenty-four years, I served on the Chapel Hill-Carrboro City School Board, was the first African American female elected to the Orange County Board of Commissioners, and served in the North Carolina state House and then state Senate. **In each of those elected positions, I focused on the issues that matter most: a good education, creating good-paying jobs, and being a champion for underrepresented communities.**

In the General Assembly, I worked across the aisle to increase access to health care and end the practice of child marriage. I also stood up to radical Republicans when they attacked a woman's right to choose, targeted our immigrant communities, and attempted to strip North Carolinians of their voting rights.

[_**I 'm proud of what I've accomplished as a public servant, but I'm not finished making a positive difference in my community. That's why I'm running for Congress. Will you help us launch our campaign in the right direction by donating today?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/uX50004l2hATUjDioA0gsKfdaQ1DRLVqXz3W5RewpOg=/F9DOTmXadGnS6UfIPfwI7YUh6EMKJg6dh7Gdkt5DsvI=?refcode=BLU-VFC-20211121-1-EM)
| [DONATE ](https://act.myngp.com/el/uX50004l2hATUjDioA0gsKfdaQ1DRLVqXz3W5RewpOg=/F9DOTmXadGnS6UfIPfwI7YUh6EMKJg6dh7Gdkt5DsvI=?refcode=BLU-VFC-20211121-1-EM)
---
If elected to Congress, I will be a champion for working families, a leader to reform our criminal justice system and tackle systemic racism, and a fighter to protect our environment and address climate change. [_**I hope you 'll help me get there by supporting my campaign for Congress in North Carolina's 6th Congressional District today.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/uX50004l2hATUjDioA0gsKfdaQ1DRLVqXz3W5RewpOg=/F9DOTmXadGnS6UfIPfwI7YUh6EMKJg6dh7Gdkt5DsvI=?refcode=BLU-VFC-20211121-1-EM)

Thank you for your time,

Valerie Foushee
_Candidate for Congress, NC-06_

* * *
| | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/uX50004l2hATUjDioA0gsKfdaQ1DRLVqXz3W5RewpOg=/F9DOTmXadGnS6UfIPfwI7YUh6EMKJg6dh7Gdkt5DsvI=?refcode=BLU-VFC-20211121-1-EM)

---

clean_body: | | Peter, My name is Valerie Foushee. I was born in Orange County, North Carolina, and have lived here for my entire life. | It wasn't always easy for me growing up. I was the oldest of six children and was born to two teenage parents. I watched my parents work multiple jobs to make ends meet and attended segregated schools until sixth grade. But even with these challenges, my parents instilled in me the importance of community, hard work, service to your neighbors, and education. These values still shape who I am today. While in high school, I worked as a church secretary, a clerk at a recreation center, and at UNC Hospitals, delivering food trays to patients to save for college. High school was also where I met my partner for life, Stan. We dated all through high school and have been married for 44 years -- we also raised two wonderful sons together! I worked hard to attend the University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill (go Tar Heels!), and this educational background set me up for a lifetime commitment to service. As a parent to young children in the Chapel Hill-Carrboro City schools system, I would leave work at the Chapel Hill Police Department at 7:00 a.m. to volunteer in my children's classrooms until 9:00 a.m. Through that volunteer service, I learned that kids, especially black and brown kids, could use another champion on the School Board who was always looking out for them and their success. So I ran, and I won. Over the next twenty-four years, I served on the Chapel Hill-Carrboro City School Board, was the first African American female elected to the Orange County Board of Commissioners, and served in the North Carolina state House and then state Senate. In each of those elected positions, I focused on the issues that matter most: a good education, creating good-paying jobs, and being a champion for underrepresented communities. In the General Assembly, I worked across the aisle to increase access to health care and end the practice of child marriage. I also stood up to radical Republicans when they attacked a woman's right to choose, targeted our immigrant communities, and attempted to strip North Carolinians of their voting rights. | If elected to Congress, I will be a champion for working families, a leader to reform our criminal justice system and tackle systemic racism, and a fighter to protect our environment and address climate change. Thank you for your time, Valerie Foushee Candidate for Congress, NC-06 * | | | Paid for by Foushee for Congress Foushee for Congress PO BOX 16446 Chapel Hill NC 27516 United States | = | = ---|--- Email is a critical way for the Foushee campaign to stay in touch with you. name: Wendy Rittenhouse
subject: NOT GUILTY.
body:
Kyle was just ACQUITTED and is now officially FREE! This was a victory for the truth, for justice, and for every American's God
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
| | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4iemqsfhp0q35dfflucejrp1v6hmdls0r3oi6fg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7clg61or6cjh2bs)
---
|
---
Friend,

**Kyle was just ACQUITTED and is now officially FREE!**

This was a victory for the truth, for justice, and for every American's God-given and unalienable right of self-defense.

We are so overcome with emotion, and as hard as that was, we are thankful.

We are thankful for the millions of Americans who stood with Kyle from the start.

We are thankful for the many others who watched the trial with an open mind, realized that they had been lied to for a year and a half, and spoke out.

And we are thankful to the jury which put aside bias, considered the facts, and came to the right decision.

Now, we will try to return to something that resembles a normal life – **however that requires one more major push to settle our case-related debts and pay off what we hope will be our final legal bills.**

**[So please, take all that positive energy I know you're feeling and make an urgent donation to help us close this very ugly chapter in our lives.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpbpk2goo5cehe3brilrnb9qnv1rfmc287npvv9g_rp22sh2s8i66pj7clg61or6cjh2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zop12rv153d907t11kj8b28jc1gssv8tck1ajb9g_rp22sh2s8i66pj7clg61or6cjh2bs)
|
---
Any funds left over will be transferred into Kyle's scholarship fund so that he'll be able to graduate from college debt-free.

You'll be hearing from us again, but for now, and from the bottom of our hearts – thank you. Thank you. Thank you.

With love,

Wendy Rittenhouse
|

subject: when I was growing up, I didn't see myself in politics

body:
Thank you in advance for hearing me out
#

Hey folks —
I know these emails pile up, so I wanted to try something different today and get right to the point. Thank you in advance for hearing me out.
[Could you please chip in $3 to my campaign for U.S. Senate today? Unlike some of my wealthy opponents, I'm a real working person running for this seat, so I'm counting on grassroots donations to fuel this movement.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38866657/317365558/-360183459?refcode2=5030b115-e44a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211121-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDMwYjExNS1lNDRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wrow3UEnd4DN-RuFyg8Ngx3a9fmlWEtNIRNYKJNbJQE=)
Honestly, when I was growing up, I didn't see myself in politics.
There were no young, gay black elected officials I could look up to.
And when I ran for State Representative in 2018, an opponent even told folks not to vote for me because I'm gay.
But I had an incredible team of working people who stood with me — friends and neighbors who believed like you and I that working folks deserve a lot better in this country.
And here's the thing: We won.
That's the power of bringing our communities together, and I know that if we build an even bigger grassroots coalition this time, we will win.
**And that's where you come in: I need your support to go the distance in this race and pull off a huge victory for the working people of Pennsylvania. So what do you say?**
[Could you please chip in $3 or whatever you can to my campaign today? It all adds up when all of us are chipping in.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38866658/317365559/-360183459?refcode2=5030b115-e44a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211121-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDMwYjExNS1lNDRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wrow3UEnd4DN-RuFyg8Ngx3a9fmlWEtNIRNYKJNbJQE=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38866660/317365560/-360183459?refcode2=5030b115-e44a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211121-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDMwYjExNS1lNDRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wrow3UEnd4DN-RuFyg8Ngx3a9fmlWEtNIRNYKJNbJQE=)**
As I always say, bravery is a renewable resource.
If we keep working hard together, I know we have what it takes to bring a new day to working folks across Pennsylvania and the country.
Thanks,
Malcolm

name: Wendy Rittenhouse
subject: NOT GUILTY.
body:
Kyle was just ACQUITTED and is now officially FREE! This was a victory for the truth, for justice, and for every American's God
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8vqucgospilpfnpt5963gpoesvt1817nrb2cff8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cli60ob4sth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tjmeap35d36elqr7d70c9hm2ctieqp68tb4spqm9db4ctjm6sdh6pg6cpj5mqo6fkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj30sllmgo7co366libad9nm2qmash5u)

---
|
---
Friend,

**Kyle was just ACQUITTED and is now officially FREE!**

This was a victory for the truth, for justice, and for every American's God-given and unalienable right of self-defense.

We are so overcome with emotion, and as hard as that was, we are thankful.

We are thankful for the millions of Americans who stood with Kyle from the start.

We are thankful for the many others who watched the trial with an open mind, realized that they had been lied to for a year and a half, and spoke out.

And we are thankful to the jury which put aside bias, considered the facts, and came to the right decision.

Now, we will try to return to something that resembles a normal life – **however that requires one more major push to settle our case-related debts and pay off what we hope will be our final legal bills.**

**[So please, take all that positive energy I know you're feeling and make an urgent donation to help us close this very ugly chapter in our lives.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zds68k692m56u5veo8gck3m0nk86bpogp08egeg8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cli60ob4sth2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zbufrritr00qplboftbqem1u44e9gpirvt12nds8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cli60ob4sth2bs)
|
---
Any funds left over will be transferred into Kyle's scholarship fund so that he'll be able to graduate from college debt-free.

You'll be hearing from us again, but for now, and from the bottom of our hearts – thank you. Thank you. Thank you.

With love,

Wendy Rittenhouse
|

body:

Friend,

**Kyle was just ACQUITTED and is now officially FREE!**

This was a victory for the truth, for justice, and for every American's God-given and unalienable right of self-defense.

We are so overcome with emotion, and as hard as that was, we are thankful.

We are thankful for the millions of Americans who stood with Kyle from the start.

We are thankful for the many others who watched the trial with an open mind, realized that they had been lied to for a year and a half, and spoke out.

And we are thankful to the jury which put aside bias, considered the facts, and came to the right decision.

Now, we will try to return to something that resembles a normal life – **however that requires one more major push to settle our case-related debts and pay off what we hope will be our final legal bills.**

**[So please, take all that positive energy I know you're feeling and make an urgent donation to help us close this very ugly chapter in our lives.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zolp0g8eo3gk9o311hef559pc1fjnqsrkn7nlke0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cli60ob4s3h2bs)**

|
---
Any funds left over will be transferred into Kyle's scholarship fund so that he'll be able to graduate from college debt-free.

You'll be hearing from us again, but for now, and from the bottom of our hearts – thank you. Thank you. Thank you.

With love,

Wendy Rittenhouse

**Listen up, friend!**
Congresswoman Val Demings is down 2 points in her race to defeat Marco Rubio. It's one of the hottest Senate races in the country – and I have zero doubt in my mind that Val Demings can win this. But Val Demings can ONLY win if activists like YOU dig deep and support her every step of the way.
So here's what I'm dropping in to tell you: Flipping Florida blue can decide our Democratic Senate majority. And CNN is calling Florida's Senate seat one of the most likely to flip in 2022 – but Florida's last Senate race was decided by just 0.12 percent (that's only 10,033 votes).
That's why moments like this can make or break a campaign. Especially when up against a right-wing incumbent like Marco Rubio, who is already sitting on a multi-million-dollar war chest and has the full GOP establishment behind him. **So I committed to helping Val Demings raise $55,000 before her midnight deadline tonight, and I'm counting on your contribution to get us there, friend: **
**[Will you rush $5 or more now to help Val Demings defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38868033/317368735/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1762-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2UwZjFjNi1lNDRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_KcSEGxyL9C2l4Vq5_3ln2rQ58jJ_YMnnh8Ln9HjNwc=)**
From the White House to the campaign trail, I've seen it all. More than most. I've seen what it takes to win, and I've seen what happens when campaigns fail to muster enough grassroots momentum. I'm told Val Demings has one of the strongest grassroots teams in Democratic politics – and trust me, I was relieved to hear it.
Because you know what we're up against, friend? Marco Rubio's campaign war chest. Mitch McConnell's super PAC that can spend near limitless sums of money. And you'd better believe Donald Trump – who has made Florida the de facto HQ for the GOP – will rally his base and spend millions to protect his crony Rubio.
That's why we need Val Demings. She's gone toe-to-toe with some of the most extreme Republicans. She impeached Donald Trump and prosecuted him in the Senate. She's a fighter for Floridians, and she has everything it takes to win. Best of all, there's momentum behind her in this race. **But a fundraising shortfall will put her dangerously behind where she needs to be.**
**So if you truly want Val Demings in the Senate, if you truly want to flip Florida blue and oust Marco Rubio, then I need you to give, because she can't cede any ground:[Make a contribution of $5 or more now – every dollar you can spare before the midnight deadline – to elect Val Demings and defend Democrats' Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38868035/317368737/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1762-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2UwZjFjNi1lNDRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_KcSEGxyL9C2l4Vq5_3ln2rQ58jJ_YMnnh8Ln9HjNwc=)**

name: Wendy Rittenhouse
subject: NOT GUILTY.
body:
Kyle was just ACQUITTED and is now officially FREE!
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z00jeaipuar8upn5tai3td0pup8t7rdt17o23bsg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpbbcb0ekqr4p9ksdie2ctkslrjcsb1ckqmacdncuq38d5lm5gr2otn64qm7dj76v970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3imtj33d5jc5jr5cb66jgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933cpjmap32c9i64oh5u)
| | | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk8gigsoecmq5osgap6qib4t2e9ammednoe7avuo_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cli64oj4c9h2bs)
---
|
---
Friend,

**Kyle was just ACQUITTED and is now officially FREE!**

This was a victory for the truth, for justice, and for every American's God-given and unalienable right of self-defense.

We are so overcome with emotion, and as hard as that was, we are thankful.

We are thankful for the millions of Americans who stood with Kyle from the start.

We are thankful for the many others who watched the trial with an open mind, realized that they had been lied to for a year and a half, and spoke out.

And we are thankful to the jury which put aside bias, considered the facts, and came to the right decision.

Now, we will try to return to something that resembles a normal life – **however that requires one more major push to settle our case-related debts and pay off what we hope will be our final legal bills.**

**[So please, take all that positive energy I know you're feeling and make an urgent donation to help us close this very ugly chapter in our lives.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdc9rgh93g8n8vqo32fsmndq0cdani8kvdjgerlg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cli64oj4c9h2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zih72a8ope3gj93684l9u5lfdieocvsci359fvg8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cli64oj4c9h2bs)
|
---
Any funds left over will be transferred into Kyle's scholarship fund so that he'll be able to graduate from college debt-free.

You'll be hearing from us again, but for now, and from the bottom of our hearts – thank you. Thank you. Thank you.

With love,

Wendy Rittenhouse
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zco43e22lt958qnjhgc4skohf870rtn9m3bbkj9o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cli64oj4c9h2bs)

**Peter – There's been a critical update in our race to defeat Sen. Grassley and flip Iowa blue:**
**FIRST:** This grassroots team helped Democrat Abby Finkenauer raise more than $1 MILLION – outraising seven-term Republican incumbent Sen. Grassley, who's been in D.C. for decades. Sen. Grassley has never faced a campaign as powerful as this one, and he's never been this vulnerable.
**BUT THEN: **The campaign arm of the Senate GOP hauled in more than $25 million in just a few months to protect vulnerable incumbents like Sen. Grassley. With nearly two-thirds of Iowans saying they're ready to show Grassley the door, the GOP establishment is prepared to spend heavily to protect him.
**NOW: **Abby is falling critically short of the $40,000 she needs to raise before the month is up. More than ever before, she needs a surge in grassroots support to compete with anticipated GOP spending and maintain our grassroots momentum.
**We just need another $16,654 before midnight tonight to stay on track for this month's fundraising goal– can Abby count on you to get her there? **

name: Wendy Rittenhouse
subject: My son is NOT GUILTY ✅
body:
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58828167:JiSiX42EN:m:1:3253819041:5ABD9166301E48A2368F6BA009ECE923:r)
---
|
---
Peter,

**Kyle was just ACQUITTED and is now officially FREE!**

This was a victory for the truth, for justice, and for every American's God-given and unalienable right of self-defense.

We are so overcome with emotion, and as hard as that was, we are thankful.

We are thankful for the millions of Americans who stood with Kyle from the start.

We are thankful for the many others who watched the trial with an open mind, realized that they had been lied to for a year and a half, and spoke out.

And we are thankful to the jury which put aside bias, considered the facts, and came to the right decision.

Now, we will try to return to something that resembles a normal life, **however that requires one more major push to settle our case-related debts and pay off what we hope will be our final legal bills.**

**[So please, take all that positive energy I know you're feeling and make an urgent donation to help us close this very ugly chapter in our lives.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58828167:JiSiX42EN:m:1:3253819041:5ABD9166301E48A2368F6BA009ECE923:r)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58828167:JiSiX42EN:m:1:3253819041:5ABD9166301E48A2368F6BA009ECE923:r)
|
---
Any funds left over will be transferred into Kyle's scholarship fund so that he'll be able to graduate from college debt-free.

You'll be hearing from us again, but for now, and from the bottom of our hearts, thank you. Thank you. Thank you.

With love,

Wendy Rittenhouse
|

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Warnock’s mom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, Senator Raphael Warnock—whose mom picked cotton and tobacco as a teenager to help her family get by—made history in January as Georgia's first Black Senator. “Because this is America, the 82-year-old hands that used to pick somebody else's cotton went to the polls and picked her youngest son to be a United States Senator,” Warnock has said. And every day Warnock is fighting hard to expand voting rights, drive down prescription drug costs, and ensure no American goes broke from medical debt—because he knows how to work hard. But right now ex-football player and financial scammer Herschel Walker—who Donald Trump hand-picked to oust Warnock—has secured 74% of Republicans' support after raising $3.7 million in the first weeks of his campaign. And Walker just won hugely influential endorsements from Mitch McConnell, Kevin McCarthy, and Newt Gingrich. If Trump and McConnell successfully suppress the vote in Georgia in 2022—a state Joe Biden won by only 0.3% in 2020—Herschel Walker will defeat Raphael Warnock, and Mitch McConnell will control the Senate once again. Together, Walker and McConnell will clear the path for Donald Trump—who's already raised $102 million for his reelection campaign—to retake the White House in 2024. Look, CNN just declared Warnock 2022's #1 Most Vulnerable Democrat. Peter, we're doing everything we can to re-elect Warnock, but up against Trump & Co's millions and the right-wing media's propaganda blitz, progressives are in for the electoral fight of our lives, and we're still down $2,500 on our daily fundraising goal. That means Raphael Warnock is in serious trouble. Will you waste all your hard work that helped elect Raphael Warnock and win our 50/50 Senate Majority? OR will you step right now, Peter, and protect Raphael Warnock, expand our razor-thin Senate Majority, and finally get this country back on track? **[Step up now, Peter: Please take a moment and donate what you can right now. Whether that's $1, $10, or $100, your donation will directly help Raphael Warnock win reelection, and protect and expand our razor-thin 50/50 Senate Majority. | | Folks, Last week, Democrats and a handful of Republicans celebrated passing their bipartisan infrastructure package -- legislation that will go a long way toward fixing our crumbling roads and bridges. Nowhere is that need greater than in my home county. _Yet, not a single House Republican from North Carolina voted for this once-in-a-generation investment -- even though it is plain to see that our state is struggling and would greatly benefit from the funding._ Below is a video of Hayes Pond, that’s right -- from the Battle of Hayes Pond, where a bridge collapsed years ago and still hasn’t been repaired. [Check out the video below, and while you’re there, please consider making a donation to my campaign -- every dollar goes towards electing a leader that will put the priorities of North Carolinians first.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38872302/317383225/-128631998?refcode=EM_BS_GRA_211121_FR_RuralInfrastructure_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzA4N2NkOS1mNDRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KfatyVam4uQ936L4NJDI7ElzvVtLnchHqE7tWcIPIMM=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38872303/317383226/-128631998?refcode=EM_BS_GRA_211121_FR_RuralInfrastructure_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzA4N2NkOS1mNDRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KfatyVam4uQ936L4NJDI7ElzvVtLnchHqE7tWcIPIMM=) | | | [Watch the Video](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38872304/317383227/-128631998?refcode=EM_BS_GRA_211121_FR_RuralInfrastructure_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzA4N2NkOS1mNDRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KfatyVam4uQ936L4NJDI7ElzvVtLnchHqE7tWcIPIMM=)

The dilapidation at Hayes Pond is due to lack of funding and North Carolina Republicans’ negligence -- they don’t care about the issues North Carolinians care about, especially that of those who live in rural parts of NC, like Robeson County.
We need to vote them out, folks. And we need to vote for leaders who will prioritize their constituents over special interest groups lining their campaign coffers.

clean_body: | = | | Folks, Last week, Democrats and a handful of Republicans celebrated passing their bipartisan infrastructure package -- legislation that will go a long way toward fixing our crumbling roads and bridges. Nowhere is that need greater than in my home county. Yet, not a single House Republican from North Carolina voted for this once-in-a-generation investment -- even though it is plain to see that our state is struggling and would greatly benefit from the funding. Below is a video of Hayes Pond, that’s right -- from the Battle of Hayes Pond, where a bridge collapsed years ago and still hasn’t been repaired. = = | | | = The dilapidation at Hayes Pond is due to lack of funding and North Carolina Republicans’ negligence -- they don’t care about the issues North Carolinians care about, especially that of those who live in rural parts of NC, like Robeson County. We need to vote them out, folks. And we need to vote for leaders who will prioritize their constituents over special interest groups lining their campaign coffers. = | ************ ** | ********=******** ********** ** | ********** ** | ********=******** ********** ** | ********** ** | ********=******** ******************** ********** ** | ********** ** | ********=******** ********** ** | ********** ** | ********=******** ******************** ********** ** | ********** ** | ********=********** Thank you, Charles | | = | | We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Mike Pompeo
subject: I've Made A Decision
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
People keep asking what my plans are for the next election. Well, I've made a decision.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?2wkub--fgxr-4qqlpo0&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

|
| | | | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2wkub-1lru0-4qqlpo2/)
---

People have been asking me recently what my plans are for the upcoming election. As one of our top America First supporters, I wanted you to be one of the first to know that I've made a decision:

**I’m 100% committed to helping Republicans win office all across the country in 2022, and I'm focusing all efforts on just that. **

That’s why I formed CAVPAC - my political organization committed to electing principled conservative leaders who won't be silenced and who refuse to give an inch to the radical Left. I’m traveling all over the country to push our candidates to victory and to fire up Republicans to turn out and vote.

**Momentum is on our side, and we must seize the moment and double down on championing American values.**

While some people are just sitting silently on the sidelines, I’m staying in the fight to save America and to champion the core values that make America great.

Do you support this mission? If so, **[please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2wkub-1lru1-4qqlpo3/ "please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.")**

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2wkub-1lru2-4qqlpo4/)
---

My time working as President Trump’s Secretary of State and CIA Director has put a target on my back. While a lot of people talk about what they WOULD do, I’ve actually gotten the job done and delivered BIG WINS for the American First agenda - from freeing three captives in North Korea to ensuring Iranian terrorists like Qasem Soleimani never threaten our freedom again. That’s made me some enemies, and they are hoping we fail.

**There is nothing the radical Left and their friends in the Fake News media love more than to mock and attack those of us close to President Trump. **

That’s why I am hoping you will **[rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First conservatives.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2wkub-1lru3-4qqlpo5/ "rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First conservatives.")** The mainstream media and their Democrat friends want to say that our movement is dead, but we cannot let that happen!

---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2wkub-1lru4-4qqlpo6/)
---

You know me, you know my record and you know that I will never stop fighting for America. With you on our team, I know we can defeat the Democrats and get back to delivering real results for the American people.

Unapologetically American,
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2wkub-1lru5-4qqlpo7/)
---

Mike Pompeo
70th Secretary of State

---
| |
Help Champion American Values: Text **CHAMPION **to **29910**
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2wkub-1lru6-4qqlpo8/ "Mike Pompeo is Calling on All Conservatives")
---

Personal note from Mike Pompeo:

I need your help if we are going to **WIN BIG** for Republicans in the upcoming elections.

I've spent my life fighting for our American values, and I'm keeping that fight alive by supporting principled conservative candidates all across the country. **[Will you chip in to help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2wkub-1lru7-4qqlpo9/ "Will you chip in to help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?")**

Thanks again for all that you do, and let's keep up the good work!

-Mike

| | Peter,

The American Society of Civil Engineers gave Colorado a C- on our infrastructure report card.

That’s why I was so relieved when Democrats in Congress and President Biden passed the Bipartisan Infrastructure Framework (BIF). This historic achievement includes the biggest investment ever to combat climate change, and will get real results for Coloradans.

I’m excited to see our state receive funds to improve access to public transportation and clean water.

clean_body: The BIF is about to upgrade us. | | Peter, The American Society of Civil Engineers gave Colorado a C- on our infrastructure report card. That’s why I was so relieved when Democrats in Congress and President Biden passed the Bipartisan Infrastructure Framework (BIF). This historic achievement includes the biggest investment ever to combat climate change, and will get real results for Coloradans. I’m excited to see our state receive funds to improve access to public transportation and clean water. As a member of the team, I’m curious to hear your opinion: where are you most excited to see funding go in Colorado? | ** Thanks for your input! Dr. Yadira Caraveo | | = = ****Learn more at:** Follow along:** | | ---|---|--- | PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS PO Box 953, Eastlake, CO 80614 If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Marisa Wood
subject: More about why I'm taking on Kevin McCarthy.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38873224/317386988/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGU2YzA3MS1mNzRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vwvJ_egWvOy7y5m93g9pRFjY8npDZwy8rcSShV2rfmk=)
Friend,

**[This is a long, but important email about how I was inspired to run for Congress. Please take a moment to read it, then consider chipping in $3 to my campaign to unseat Kevin McCarthy.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38873225/317386989/-787496292?refcode=em-112121-nopen-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGU2YzA3MS1mNzRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vwvJ_egWvOy7y5m93g9pRFjY8npDZwy8rcSShV2rfmk=)**
| **[Contribute »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38873226/317386990/-787496292?refcode=em-112121-nopen-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGU2YzA3MS1mNzRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vwvJ_egWvOy7y5m93g9pRFjY8npDZwy8rcSShV2rfmk=)**
---

I grew up in a small working class town here in California where everyone knew each other. My dad was a teacher, and my mom was a secretary. They worked hard, but always made time for family.

At first, my parents couldn't afford to send me to a university -- so I started at community college instead. Like many students at the time, I paid my way through school by working part time.

For me, hard work paid off. But after 20 years of teaching students, it's clear that opportunities to get ahead for many others are being cut short by politicians like Kevin McCarthy.

Kevin has represented us for nearly 15 years with absolutely NOTHING to show for it except being a lapdog to Trump and his wealthy donors.

**I hear stories every day from my kiddos and their parents about the challenges they face -- while they work harder than ever, wages have stagnated and the ultra-wealthy are getting richer and richer.**

Heck, my family has had our fair share of struggles too, but like many families here in the Central Valley, you just learn to deal.

It's unacceptable that our current representative is doing so much to hurt our community. Despite the odds, we must do something about it -- that's why I'm stepping up to run for Congress and why I'm asking:

**[We're coming up $11,301 short of our weekly goal to DEFEAT Kevin McCarthy. That means we need to see A TON of supporters chipping in a grassroots donation before tonight. Can you kick in $3 today to help us meet the mark?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38873228/317386992/-787496292?refcode=em-112121-nopen-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGU2YzA3MS1mNzRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vwvJ_egWvOy7y5m93g9pRFjY8npDZwy8rcSShV2rfmk=)**

clean_body: | = Friend, = | = I grew up in a small working class town here in California where everyone knew each other. My dad was a teacher, and my mom was a secretary. They worked hard, but always made time for family. At first, my parents couldn't afford to send me to a university -- so I started at community college instead. Like many students at the time, I paid my way through school by working part time. For me, hard work paid off. But after 20 years of teaching students, it's clear that opportunities to get ahead for many others are being cut short by politicians like Kevin McCarthy. Kevin has represented us for nearly 15 years with absolutely NOTHING to show for it except being a lapdog to Trump and his wealthy donors. I hear stories every day from my kiddos and their parents about the challenges they face -- while they work harder than ever, wages have stagnated and the ultra-wealthy are getting richer and richer. Heck, my family has had our fair share of struggles too, but like many families here in the Central Valley, you just learn to deal. It's unacceptable that our current representative is doing so much to hurt our community. Despite the odds, we must do something about it -- that's why I'm stepping up to run for Congress and why I'm asking: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks in advance, Marisa Wood Teacher for Congress = | = Marisa Wood is a public school teacher and Democrat running a historic campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy in California's 23rd District. 2022 is our best shot in decades to finally defeat McCarthy. Consider supporting Marisa's campaign by = If you'd prefer to send a check, our address is: Marisa Wood for Congress, PO Box 12103, Bakersfield, CA 93389. We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Marisa Wood for Congress PO Box 12103 Bakersfield, CA 93389 United States

name: Team Mia
subject: Share your campaign priorities with Mia

body:
Take our short survey. | | | _Mia McLeod is running to become our next governor because she has the experience and the courage to build a South Carolina that’s as strong as we are. If you no longer want to receive updates from our campaign, you can[unsubscribe here.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4G3cdy8v6-1NSOaVSJqG3IJkPdgquBxFNnSpiFvELjP1aa5c5x2Mio0YKxl2MsaUqBQ23KBQXw032-w8FDQgiI8DbHCYdtIg1R0XccgMgtR6VflR8WV6rXWeo8mk2Mv4ThVgkF7XOurBP3LhSSq8-VIWWqVh8WxKRuNIMvssVb7jdfTikgJORYSaHdoz0Uy6XkRlkkd24xlfJoIoNuVkvI1KndLnJYEule4pG3nziw2O6OZ2tzIbSH4uyvwjzSExWCwCh76czmV51DMyKTZ8L8z4eqFprfbbyJsO3Npxy5c3_EkpEc73G7_MPoYDaRqCNyLxgcyOHJ-a-72cHifpxzTp5HIz8oOzP3okq2-eKFfF8eFPVGehuNK5tFgj23pZtj/3h7/2VbIrArRQFOuw4LRDrXraA/h0/fMy4-EPp0oyIEjatPjM9A2wJ_HfeWv82uKKz_CXXm68)_ Friend — From her time as an advocate for women who were victims of violent crimes to her tenure now in the State Senate, the interests of her constituents have always been at the center of Mia’s work. And as we look ahead to South Carolina’s road to recovery, it’s clear a lot has to change. **That’s why Mia wants to hear directly from you, the grassroots supporters at the heart of this campaign, about what your top priorities are for South Carolina.** **[Friend, will you take our short survey to share what issues are most important to you? Your input will help guide this campaign as Mia fights for a South Carolina that’s as strong as we are.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkDihDXMqKsoP2EjdvtN2Op6WKovori4miSosJaRPk6ayVpb48fxxwgzRxlqvrqxjbjo6F1Wzzx_c6epcAjt6VJI2LXDqXpAQamntSoeZDQXn8TVOxe3DRBAN1LjDYPvwrHKwI3VKbBsltkZocR_y4TnaqyPxfQdJTrO5we3ZKyMzIB2eGYSbspciKKfid_72sVI5G7jxVV9oe5n25tExtjqLMT4Wyz46YsL5QKFzZ00JWqJlMFuasEaZDa57ArUEghj1Je9GsKCgEzqLLm2BSO00aWMGHj2ldWKM1iZ5BsVTFoEZqoBJokI4dXmtRq7kk/3h7/2VbIrArRQFOuw4LRDrXraA/h1/GccadMsaMHGS6gXjFUb4VL4rK9FpTWEsafbHRCORTVI)** | | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkDihDXMqKsoP2EjdvtN2Op6WKovori4miSosJaRPk6ayVpb48fxxwgzRxlqvrqxjYsTrKITJfR_12J1T7x_k91biHV75gw9X2YEaWsYqRCscTfj_08f57N42wFWqUL4TO54878n2M9XB6st-UX8nLm_gG3vsp5bK2E8zrnhykmwTJePKfalP3LF4yDpsXVQ9sBvvybVDdIqqT8s7kQls7Em-6c2A4-F86nNfZah0Jg33ua8zSqDmPUTQe3guZnSVLTuWlupvVtp3pFcNhg13hpp_mTO0y_WPv8at1YzADzdo0ORf-03CGqaLd8xIYaWhg/3h7/2VbIrArRQFOuw4LRDrXraA/h2/_6wfFVxSK_Px99MZDi5BTmWyWg0VMj2Ucxn9PvhL7MA)
---
Governor McMaster has failed us too many times to count. He botched South Carolina’s response to the coronavirus which cost countless lives, and now he’s jeopardizing our recovery by politicizing pandemic relief for struggling families and small businesses.
**Rebuilding in a way that serves all South Carolinians won’t be easy, but it’s what will be needed if we want to avoid returning to the policies that left us so vulnerable in the first place.**
That’s why Mia is fighting for a South Carolina where the zip code you were raised in will no longer determine the quality of your education, jobs, and healthcare;
Where people can earn wages they can actually live on, with equal pay for equal work, and home-grown folks can earn the skills to qualify for high-paying jobs without having to leave the state;
Where women — not politicians — make their own healthcare decisions.
**[There’s no shortage of issues that need to be addressed in a government that works for all of its communities. Friend, will you share with Mia what your top priorities are for South Carolina?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkDihDXMqKsoP2EjdvtN2Op6WKovori4miSosJaRPk6ayVpb48fxxwgzRxlqvrqxjYfg8z9GE8gyhT1WhEqtfmtA-VkFx6-r7VgoDw4gYUoHf-3RMdMI1LkRrPprlmIdFIeQb6Ql3Wr_Nc0gZclwCMytgVFHaxgg99UiC8tcwDAZlbyG-pJGAmPKEPVZpOFhJ4o1GwizDkxhWObt_6QdgwjlTixu0eGQIYexDIou4ArXuJLBV3zH-QsC0LWwNNzXaDbGt82piFkZ87UP4e2UYjOch0HW3b-gjITNxV5Ygno-2z4LXlZRahF8k-ilg7VqU8/3h7/2VbIrArRQFOuw4LRDrXraA/h3/C8WvQ38ydxRQ5k61yAZhb4js6aqHf-l7cKXd3gTHvpc)**

**Your feedback will help my campaign decide which issues we’re going to talk about on the trail.** In the coming days, we’ll start by compiling the top responses and sharing with you the progress we’ve made, what we’re going to accomplish moving forward, and how you can help get it done.
After all, the only way we’ll hold on to the most competitive seat in the country is if we get _all hands on deck to make positive change._
This campaign has always been powered by the people and the only way we can truly live up to that motto is by including the voices of as many supporters as possible.
[_**Team, can you share what issues currently matter the most to you and your family right now? It will only take a few minutes.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38873645/317389906/1061109180?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDY4ZmUzYS1mZDRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TvtOqyfER-5J8iHbt3Izl59QV31yVBSEAu_qzwAQT1U=&emci=2d1fa49d-5b49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=fd68fe3a-fd4a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=10997957)

name: Derek Marshall
subject: 2022 is our biggest fight yet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
**I want to take a moment to talk about something major that’s happening across the country that will have a massive impact on next year’s elections: redistricting.** When it comes to California, we’re lucky enough to have an independent commission made up of Democrats, Republicans, and non-partisan voters who actually work to make the new districts fairer and more consistent.
We’re still waiting for the final maps for California’s 8th district, but while we do, there’s a pressing conversation we must have about the national trends. The fact of the matter is simple, but terrifying. **Republicans have been so successful at deciding the redistricting process in many states that they are manufacturing control of the House of Representatives even before election season really starts. **
Our seat will become a critical race for Democrats because this district is actually winnable. Democrats will need every single seat we can win back from the Republicans. It’s worse than the GOP not playing fair—they’re not playing by the rules of democracy at all. **[Will you contribute today to support our insurgent progressive race and help us flip this seat for Democrats?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38873659/317389975/1422927319?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTY5ZmUzYS1mZDRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DzXWV9fih3QTEB8Fxm2sb2QWg65NVa72m_sePagkxDM=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38873663/317389977/1422927319?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTY5ZmUzYS1mZDRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DzXWV9fih3QTEB8Fxm2sb2QWg65NVa72m_sePagkxDM=)
**Check out what the Washington Post had to say: **
“The word ‘redistricting’ doesn’t carry the same inherent drama as a crowd of rabid thugs breaking doors and windows to storm the Capitol. But the way it’s proceeding right now, in its own way **it’s just as much of an assault on our democracy** ...
Not only are Republicans frantically redrawing lines to increase their advantage; they’re doing it in a way that in place after place ensures that **the results of every election will be clear long before any candidates debate issues or voters contemplate their choices** ...
Its goal is not merely to give Republicans an advantage in close elections. **Its goal is to make elections irrelevant** , so that no matter what the voters want, **Republicans always stay in power**.”

We’re sounding the alarm early because we know it will take a huge amount of support and an engaged grassroots base to win this race. **Just because we can win doesn’t mean we automatically will**. Before we can begin our comprehensive ground game in the new year, we have to raise the resources to fund it. And there’s no doubt about it, we will need a lot of resources.

**[Anything you can spare is will help us get us there. Will you donate any amount today so we can flip this district blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38873665/317389982/1422927319?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTY5ZmUzYS1mZDRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DzXWV9fih3QTEB8Fxm2sb2QWg65NVa72m_sePagkxDM=)**

In Solidarity,

**Derek Marshall**
Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-08

name: Roy Cooper
subject: We need to talk about the climate crisis, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
The clock has run down. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38873649/317389965/823540626?refcode=ea.1169fe3a-fd4a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ms=ea.1169fe3a-fd4a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTY5ZmUzYS1mZDRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cA2wnI2OJWDgBvJBl063vaRRW3SRD6cfQjrkgdZkhY4=&emci=9fd9c6a3-8449-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=1169fe3a-fd4a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=1049176)
Peter — I have some thoughts on the climate crisis facing our planet I’d like to share, so this email is a little longer than usual. I hope you’ll read to the end. **[Are you in this fight with me, Peter? If you don’t need to read any further, please chip in $10 or anything that works for you to support our mission to elect Democratic climate champions up and down the ballot in North Carolina next year>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38873650/317389966/435245919?amount=10&refcode=ea.1169fe3a-fd4a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ms=ea.1169fe3a-fd4a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTY5ZmUzYS1mZDRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cA2wnI2OJWDgBvJBl063vaRRW3SRD6cfQjrkgdZkhY4=)** | [DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38873651/317389967/435245919?amount=10&refcode=ea.1169fe3a-fd4a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ms=ea.1169fe3a-fd4a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTY5ZmUzYS1mZDRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cA2wnI2OJWDgBvJBl063vaRRW3SRD6cfQjrkgdZkhY4=)
---
For decades, climate experts have given the same warning. That we were running out of time to take the action necessary to save our planet.
_Now, the clock has run down._
We’re out of time to reverse the damage of climate change entirely. Recent reports suggest that 1.5 degrees Celsius of warming — the temperature at which experts hoped to stop warming entirely — is inevitable in the next 20 years and that even if nations meet their current pledges to reduce carbon emissions, we’re headed for warming of 2.7 °C by the end of the century.
We have committed ourselves to a certain level of warming – at least 1.5 °C. At that point, we can expect bigger storms, longer droughts, hotter summers, and more harmful outcomes of climate change. We must prepare our communities to face the challenges of a warmer world.
That means investing in our frontline communities — like those in North Carolina’s Outer Banks — so they can prepare for rising sea levels. It means determining more efficient ways to produce crops in the face of changing, extreme weather. It means building more resilient infrastructure that can withstand stronger storms.
It will mean doing whatever it takes to mitigate the harm.
**But 2.7 °C? That would be truly catastrophic, Peter.**
_We need to change course now. And I believe that we can._
What it comes down to is this: If we don’t prioritize defending against climate change at the societal level — ending our reliance on fossil fuels, going carbon neutral, and fundamentally changing the way we think about our duty to this planet — our children will be left with a world that can’t sustain them.
**It’s why, just last month, I proudly signed historic legislation to reduce North Carolina’s carbon emissions by 70% by 2030 and to go carbon neutral by 2050. It’s why promoting clean energy alternatives is a priority of our administration.**
But my actions alone won’t be enough.
**We MUST elect leaders at every level of government who recognize the severity of this crisis and are ready to act.**
**[Your help is critical to our plans to do just that. Can you pitch in right now to support our efforts to elect more Democratic leaders for North Carolina in next year’s midterms? clean_body: The clock has run down. | Peter — I have some thoughts on the climate crisis facing our planet I’d like to share, so this email is a little longer than usual. I hope you’ll read to the end. = | = For decades, climate experts have given the same warning. That we were running out of time to take the action necessary to save our planet. Now, the clock has run down. We’re out of time to reverse the damage of climate change entirely. Recent reports suggest that 1.5 degrees Celsius of warming — the temperature at which experts hoped to stop warming entirely — is inevitable in the next 20 years and that even if nations meet their current pledges to reduce carbon emissions, we’re headed for warming of 2.7 °C by the end of the century. We have committed ourselves to a certain level of warming – at least 1.5 °C. At that point, we can expect bigger storms, longer droughts, hotter summers, and more harmful outcomes of climate change. We must prepare our communities to face the challenges of a warmer world. That means investing in our frontline communities — like those in North Carolina’s Outer Banks — so they can prepare for rising sea levels. It means determining more efficient ways to produce crops in the face of changing, extreme weather. It means building more resilient infrastructure that can withstand stronger storms. It will mean doing whatever it takes to mitigate the harm. But 2.7 °C? That would be truly catastrophic, Peter. We need to change course now. And I believe that we can. What it comes down to is this: If we don’t prioritize defending against climate change at the societal level — ending our reliance on fossil fuels, going carbon neutral, and fundamentally changing the way we think about our duty to this planet — our children will be left with a world that can’t sustain them. It’s why, just last month, I proudly signed historic legislation to reduce North Carolina’s carbon emissions by 70% by 2030 and to go carbon neutral by 2050. It’s why promoting clean energy alternatives is a priority of our administration. But my actions alone won’t be enough. We MUST elect leaders at every level of government who recognize the severity of this crisis and are ready to act. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Together, we can accomplish the hardest, most important goals. We can protect our planet — the only home we have. Thank you, Roy = = = mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign. body:
Wisconsin Republicans just voted to pass one of the most extreme gerrymandered maps in the entire country!

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38873664/317389981/-1995343361?refcode=abd_em_fr_2021.10.04_bX_logo_x__f1_s1_c1__header&amount=25&utm_campaign=abd_em_pet_2021.11.21_b1_gerrymandering_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&ms=ABD_EM_PET_2021.11.21_b1_gerrymandering_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTY5ZmUzYS1mZDRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b0V_f3dKLBFL3S6Z833Zuomam-NKLDfoNVL-l-Dld7g=)

Friends --

Wisconsin Republicans just voted to pass one of the most extreme gerrymandered maps in the entire country!

We were FURIOUS. If these maps become the law of the land, they would give Republicans an automatic advantage in the state -- and make it almost impossible for someone like Brad to win.

**Thankfully, Governor Tony Evers just vetoed these maps.**

Look, the fight for fair maps shouldn’t be partisan. But if we don’t fight for fair maps now, we won't have a chance until 2031. Our democracy can’t wait that long.

**[Sign your name right now to demand fair Congressional maps in Wisconsin>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38873666/317389983/120279127?refcode=ABD_EM_PET_2021.11.21_b1_gerrymandering_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_campaign=abd_em_pet_2021.11.21_b1_gerrymandering_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&ms=ABD_EM_PET_2021.11.21_b1_gerrymandering_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTY5ZmUzYS1mZDRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b0V_f3dKLBFL3S6Z833Zuomam-NKLDfoNVL-l-Dld7g=&emci=22a45124-6c49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=0169fe3a-fd4a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=3200050)** | [SIGN YOUR NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38873668/317389985/120279127?refcode=ABD_EM_PET_2021.11.21_b1_gerrymandering_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_campaign=abd_em_pet_2021.11.21_b1_gerrymandering_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&ms=ABD_EM_PET_2021.11.21_b1_gerrymandering_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTY5ZmUzYS1mZDRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b0V_f3dKLBFL3S6Z833Zuomam-NKLDfoNVL-l-Dld7g=&emci=22a45124-6c49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=0169fe3a-fd4a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=3200050)
---
Redistricting affects everything you care about. It determines who we send to Washington and the policies we are able to enact.

And drawing biased, unfair maps dilutes the voices of voters in our state, and the ideals our country was founded on.

But Republicans are going to do everything in their power to enact their gerrymandered maps. So we need your help to stop them.

**[Will you sign your name today to demand fair Congressional maps in Wisconsin?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38873670/317389987/120279127?refcode=ABD_EM_PET_2021.11.21_b1_gerrymandering_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_campaign=abd_em_pet_2021.11.21_b1_gerrymandering_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&ms=ABD_EM_PET_2021.11.21_b1_gerrymandering_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTY5ZmUzYS1mZDRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b0V_f3dKLBFL3S6Z833Zuomam-NKLDfoNVL-l-Dld7g=&emci=22a45124-6c49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=0169fe3a-fd4a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=3200050)**

Thank you for your help,

My team and I know we could be headed into what’s called the “holiday slump” -- a major slowdown in political donations during the holiday months. That means fewer people are opening fundraising emails like this one.
But when you’re running in a competitive district, especially one with radical far-right opponents, you can’t slow down.
That’s exactly why we spend our time knocking on doors and connecting directly with voters across Western NC.
Our path to victory relies on talking to as many people as we can, as early as we can, and as often as we can. We need to make sure voters hear our campaign message of love, hope, and a new path forward -- and that takes continual organizing and the resources to make that happen.
[**As one of our most dedicated supporters, can we count on you to make a donation to keep us on track to hit our November fundraising goal? It will really mean a lot and make a difference!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38873865/317390449/1055886451?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211121_FR_AnyoneThere_A0_na_U1_X2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzY4ZmUzYS1mZDRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nwCxsaWy8UI-LCg7Q5KUHcGthuuMsJMgS_Yf0fy6TDs=)

clean_body: | = | | Peter, Thank you for opening this email -- seriously, we know you get a lot of emails. Plus, it’s the holiday season. = | | | = My team and I know we could be headed into what’s called the “holiday slump” -- a major slowdown in political donations during the holiday months. That means fewer people are opening fundraising emails like this one. But when you’re running in a competitive district, especially one with radical far-right opponents, you can’t slow down. That’s exactly why we spend our time knocking on doors and connecting directly with voters across Western NC. Our path to victory relies on talking to as many people as we can, as early as we can, and as often as we can. We need to make sure voters hear our campaign message of love, hope, and a new path forward -- and that takes continual organizing and the resources to make that happen. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks so much for your support, Jasmine | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Reminder: Calling for Accountability
body:
Beacon Hill Must do Better
| | | |
---
---
---
| | |
---|---
|
Geoff Diehl, Republican candidate for Governor, issued the following statement today regarding the end of legislative formal sessions for 2021:
"I am concerned that the Legislature's failure to complete work on several substantial bills before the end of formal sessions last night, including how to allocate almost $4 billion of money for pandemic-related concerns, will lead to these proposals being passed during informal sessions where there is no debate and no recorded votes.

"This is no way to make important decisions under normal circumstances, but it's even worse that it's coming at a time when the State House literally has been closed to the public for more than 600 days. I believe the people of Massachusetts deserve better and demand greater accountability from members of the Legislature. Taxpayers need important spending decisions to be made in the light of day, and voters deserve to know how their legislators are voting on important business.

"Therefore, I call upon members of the House and Senate to suspend their internal Joint Rule 12A and extend the time for formal legislative sessions for another month, through the third Wednesday in December. That way, legislators will have additional time to make sure any decisions they make on spending are fiscally responsible and above board. There must be checks and balances in-place, along with transparency and public accountability, to control passage of measures and spending that either need more deliberation or shouldn't be passed at all."

Diehl, a Republican and former State Representative from Whitman, has made government accountability and fiscal responsibility a cornerstone of his campaign for Governor, and has repeatedly called for measures to ensure greater election integrity in Massachusetts.

|

---

---
|

|

clean_body: We genuinely believe the filibuster needs to go. | | The Senate filibuster is the ONLY thing in the way of President Biden’s agenda. We genuinely believe the filibuster needs to go. Peter, do YOU agree? PLEASE ANSWER NOW: | YOUR RESPONSE IS DUE BY MIDNIGHT TONIGHT The filibuster is a Jim-Crow relic designed to destroy popular legislation in the Senate and stifle much-needed progress. And right now, Republicans are using the filibuster to BLOCK President Biden’s ultra‐popular agenda. We need to stop them in their tracks. Our Democratic Senate Majority can END THE FILIBUSTER -- but we need to make sure 890 of our best Democrats are rallying behind us to do it. PLEASE ANSWER NOW: Peter, we need your input from our best-informed grassroots Democrats. DO YOU THINK WE SHOULD ABOLISH THE FILIBUSTER? | NAME: Peter Willis DEADLINE: MIDNIGHT TONIGHT Without 890 responses from your area by midnight, our data will be rendered statistically insignificant. subject: Indicting Bannon is LUDICROUS

body:
CNN called it a "warning" to the rest of President Trump's allies.
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58828368:JbXFS42lN:m:1:3253819041:DCDD4E9565FD90094E6EAC7BC99F96D9:r)
---
Peter,
---
**_Steve Bannon was just INDICTED on bogus charges of 'criminal contempt of Congress.'_**
---
CNN immediately called Bannon's indictment a "WARNING" to the rest of President Trump's allies like me.
---
_There 's no other way to say this: I urgently need your support._
---
[**Please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust -- the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund -- as I continue to battle for my freedom and justice.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58828368:JbXFS42lN:m:1:3253819041:DCDD4E9565FD90094E6EAC7BC99F96D9:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58828368:JbXFS42lN:m:1:3253819041:DCDD4E9565FD90094E6EAC7BC99F96D9:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58828368:JbXFS42lN:m:1:3253819041:DCDD4E9565FD90094E6EAC7BC99F96D9:r)
---
**To indict Bannon for refusing to testify is LUDICROUS.**
---
Bannon may not even have the right to testify in the first place due to executive privilege.
---
__But these vengeful thugs don 't give a DAMN about the law.__
---
Hell, they had the gall to RAID my law offices!
---
This is nothing but political vengeance against President Trump and his allies like me who had the audacity to form a new government that finally put the American people first.
---
In fact, CNN accidentally admitted the truth...
---
**...They said that Bannon 's indictment will show whether President Trump's allies "can endure protracted legal battles..."**
---
_The Deep State is trying to bury us in so many subpoenas and legal fees until we can simply no longer "endure."_
---
_But mark my words:_ **__I WILL endure__** \-- because thousands of patriots like you are supporting me against this unjust assault on my freedom and justice.
---
[**So please, make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust -- the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund -- as I continue to battle for my freedom and justice.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58828368:JbXFS42lN:m:1:3253819041:DCDD4E9565FD90094E6EAC7BC99F96D9:r)

Thank you,

|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38874638/317394157/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjZmMTMxZC0wMjRiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XDpkg_lIalVGjVQrSv50lg8UWOlk0VBbRtz30c7DunE=)
Friend, Our country took a huge step forward this week when President Biden signed the _Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act_ into law. Michael was there to celebrate the work he’s done alongside his Senate colleague to make this historic moment happen, and he’s proud to play a role in bringing our infrastructure into the twenty-first century. This new law provides Colorado with funding to start repairing the more than 3,600 miles of highways and 481 bridges in poor condition; an investment in making public transportation more accessible for Coloradans getting to school and work; broadband for people who don’t currently have it and help for others who cannot afford it. It works to ensure safe, clean drinking water is accessible everywhere, especially for our Tribal communities, provides resources to protect against wildfires, and so much more. All of those achievements were possible thanks to grassroots supporters pitching in to help Democrats like Michael flip the Senate last year. With a 50-50 split, our slim majority is on the line again in 2022 and Democrats like Michael are vulnerable to GOP targeting. While Michael is running to build on this progress, he’s facing well-funded attacks from Republican opponents here in Colorado and the National GOP. Republicans only need to pick up one seat next year to take back the Senate, and they’re targeting Colorado as a key state to flip. Because Michael’s committed to serving Coloradans and not corporate special interests he doesn’t accept a cent from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists. This campaign is powered by contributions made in response to emails like these — just regular folks pitching in $3, $10, or $20 at a time. **So we’re counting on grassroots support from folks like you to hold Michael’s seat and defend our Senate majority. Will you chip in $10 or more to help Michael continue fighting for Colorado’s values in Washington?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **** | | | ****[Donate $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38874639/317394158/-1836949484?express_lane=true&amount=10&&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211121_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjZmMTMxZC0wMjRiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XDpkg_lIalVGjVQrSv50lg8UWOlk0VBbRtz30c7DunE=)****

clean_body: | = Friend, Our country took a huge step forward this week when President Biden signed the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act into law. Michael was there to celebrate the work he’s done alongside his Senate colleague to make this historic moment happen, and he’s proud to play a role in bringing our infrastructure into the twenty-first century. This new law provides Colorado with funding to start repairing the more than 3,600 miles of highways and 481 bridges in poor condition; an investment in making public transportation more accessible for Coloradans getting to school and work; broadband for people who don’t currently have it and help for others who cannot afford it. It works to ensure safe, clean drinking water is accessible everywhere, especially for our Tribal communities, provides resources to protect against wildfires, and so much more. All of those achievements were possible thanks to grassroots supporters pitching in to help Democrats like Michael flip the Senate last year. With a 50-50 split, our slim majority is on the line again in 2022 and Democrats like Michael are vulnerable to GOP targeting. While Michael is running to build on this progress, he’s facing well-funded attacks from Republican opponents here in Colorado and the National GOP. Republicans only need to pick up one seat next year to take back the Senate, and they’re targeting Colorado as a key state to flip. Because Michael’s committed to serving Coloradans and not corporate special interests he doesn’t accept a cent from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists. This campaign is powered by contributions made in response to emails like these — just regular folks pitching in $3, $10, or $20 at a time. So we’re counting on grassroots support from folks like you to hold Michael’s seat and defend our Senate majority. Will you chip in $10 or more to help Michael continue fighting for Colorado’s values in Washington? # Americans abandoned, Michael Bennet is complicit
---
Every day we find out there are more Americans still left behind in Afghanistan. Following the disastrous withdrawal of U.S. troops from Afghanistan, their security is tenuous. Has the Biden administration been lying to us?
Shortly after the tragic failure, it was reported that only about 100 Americans were still left in that war-torn country. Foreignpolicy.com is reporting that the State Department believes there is as many as 14,000 Americans left in Afghanistan. Whether it's one American or 14,000, no American should be left behind. Our government and our military exist solely to serve the American people. Period.
Of course, we're hearing very little from the Leftist media about the ongoing impacts from Joe Biden's haphazard withdrawal--a disaster Michael Bennet covered up and is therefore complicit in. We now know Afghanistan's economy is collapsing and its people are starving; Americans are living in these conditions as well.
It could have been prevented. Michael Bennet, who serves on the U.S. Senate Select Committee on Intelligence, never spoke up. Of course, he has a long history of not standing up for anything, especially the people of Colorado or this country. I would have exhausted every effort to ensure there was a clear and reasonable plan to withdraw--all American citizens first, then equipment (worth more than $80 billion), and finally the military. But sadly, you won't hear any more about it on the news. By the way, where have all the honorable reporters gone?
Bennet says he "believes in a strong, thoughtful security policy that advances U.S. interests abroad while protecting our nation at home," yet his actions prove otherwise. In fact, it seems he is doing everything possible to undermine our national security abroad, and our public safety at home.
Help me bring courage, honor, and virtue to Washington. On the field of battle, I grew to trust the actions of men and women over their words. In this political arena, I notice Senator Bennett's words do not match his cowardly actions. America deserves better.
The irresponsible leadership keeps Americans at risk in a foreign country is unfathomable. I will stand up for what is right to protect Americans and Coloradans from the corrupt, self-serving politicians in D.C. Join our cause and donate today!

clean_body: (and not a word from the Leftist media) | | | | == | | Americans abandoned, Michael Bennet is complicit Every day we find out there are more Americans still left behind in Afghanistan. Following the disastrous withdrawal of U.S. troops from Afghanistan, their security is tenuous. Has the Biden administration been lying to us? Shortly after the tragic failure, it was reported that only about 100 Americans were still left in that war-torn country. Foreignpolicy.com is reporting that the State Department believes there is as many as 14,000 Americans left in Afghanistan. Whether it's one American or 14,000, no American should be left behind. Our government and our military exist solely to serve the American people. Period. Of course, we're hearing very little from the Leftist media about the ongoing impacts from Joe Biden's haphazard withdrawal--a disaster Michael Bennet covered up and is therefore complicit in. We now know Afghanistan's economy is collapsing and its people are starving; Americans are living in these conditions as well. It could have been prevented. Michael Bennet, who serves on the U.S. Senate Select Committee on Intelligence, never spoke up. Of course, he has a long history of not standing up for anything, especially the people of Colorado or this country. I would have exhausted every effort to ensure there was a clear and reasonable plan to withdraw--all American citizens first, then equipment (worth more than $80 billion), and finally the military. But sadly, you won't hear any more about it on the news. By the way, where have all the honorable reporters gone? Bennet says he "believes in a strong, thoughtful security policy that advances U.S. interests abroad while protecting our nation at home," yet his actions prove otherwise. In fact, it seems he is doing everything possible to undermine our national security abroad, and our public safety at home. Help me bring courage, honor, and virtue to Washington. On the field of battle, I grew to trust the actions of men and women over their words. In this political arena, I notice Senator Bennett's words do not match his cowardly actions. America deserves better. The irresponsible leadership keeps Americans at risk in a foreign country is unfathomable. I will stand up for what is right to protect Americans and Coloradans from the corrupt, self-serving politicians in D.C. Join our cause and donate today! | | | | | == | | | | I need your help. Please donate to our fight so I can stand for you in the U.S. Senate. A quick donation from you goes a long way. Meanwhile, I'll work to make your donation matter. | == | You can help in two ways: First, write your current lawmaker opposing this outrage. Second, help me go to Washington to fight for you, your children and the future of our country. | | == | Together we can stand against the destructive policies of a heartless Biden administration. I need your support today | | | == PO Box 630552 Littleton, co 80163 (303) 903 1985 | == == == | | | | | | | Aadland For Senate | PO Box 630552, Littleton, CO 80163 | | Sent by mailto:info@aadlandforcolorado.com in collaboration with |

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: I realize nobody wants to read emails on a Sunday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Derek,
I realize it's the weekend! So I'm hoping this is the shortest email you read today:
**We're 9 days away from one of the biggest fundraising deadlines since launching this campaign to elect John Fetterman. But right now, we're pretty behind pace on our fundraising.**
With most folks logging off for the holiday later this week, we're really hoping you'll help us get back on track while we still can. [** _You have yet to chip in directly to John Fetterman's campaign, so I'm respectfully asking: Will you kick in $5 right now to help close the gap on our fundraising ahead of next week's deadline?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37445?refcode=em20211121-3527&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3527%2E434096%2EpFPo5V)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37445?refcode=em20211121-3527&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=3527%2E434096%2EpFPo5V)**
I told you I'd keep it short — now go enjoy your Sunday!
Eric 💙
Eric Stern
Deputy Campaign Manager
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate

clean_body: Derek, I realize it's the weekend! So I'm hoping this is the shortest email you read today: We're 9 days away from one of the biggest fundraising deadlines since launching this campaign to elect John Fetterman. But right now, we're pretty behind pace on our fundraising. With most folks logging off for the holiday later this week, we're really hoping you'll help us get back on track while we still can. I told you I'd keep it short — now go enjoy your Sunday! Eric 💙 Eric Stern Deputy Campaign Manager John Fetterman for U.S. Senate | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

name: Delina DiSanto
subject: Texas has a big announcement!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Delina DiSanto for Congress
