name: Mark Kelly for Senate
subject: Need a lot of donations from 20895 TODAY.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
While we wait to find out who our opponent will be and just how much outside money will be spent against Mark
#

Friends —
While we wait to find out who our opponent will be and just how much outside money will be spent against Mark, one thing we know for sure is we have to reach our fundraising goals if we’re going to win.
And right now, honestly, November has been a tough month.
The good news is Stacey Abrams is with us:
| | | | | | | | | | |
---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---
| “With your help, Mark’s campaign will register every eligible voter possible, engage Arizonans in every corner of the state, and build a broad coalition of supporters from all walks of life.”
Cory Booker is with us:
| | | | | | | | | | |
---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---
| “If we are going to bring people together and move this country forward through these difficult times, we need more Mark Kellys in the Senate, not fewer.”
Tammy Duckworth is with us:
| | | | | | | | | | |
---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---
| “Veterans approach public service differently than politicians. We're trained to be solution-oriented. Veterans are more likely to put aside differences in pursuit of common goals. That’s one of the reasons I’m emailing to ask you to support Mark Kelly today.”
But we are really looking for 20895 to show up today. Because if we can’t pick up the pace SOON, we really risk falling behind.
[**Can Mark Kelly count on you to make your first online $3 contribution today? We have fallen behind in November and really need a big day to catch up.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?refcode=em211121-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1688_6688874_nBN6Zh&akid=1688%2E6688874%2EnBN6Zh)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

name: Madison Horn via madisonhorn.com
subject: why we need to invest in education
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oklahomans for Madison
body:
| Growing up in rural Stilwell, my family instilled the importance of education in me from a young age. That wasn’t always easy — to put myself through college, I had to work four jobs — but it is essential to create more opportunities for Oklahoma’s children.

I was lucky to have a strong foundation in my local, public schools, but I know that future generations won’t get that unless we invest right away.

With Oklahoma ranked near the _bottom_ of states nationwide for education, this must be a primary focus of our leaders.

**[That’s why I’m asking you to sign my petition TODAY to stand up for investing in Oklahoma schools now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38875527/317402005/1487561253?refcode=MH_EM_PT_1MO_211121_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzVhZGNmZS0wZDRiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dTgfq4_0bO5KtoCHYt_WlxTrUUhtFwu7ckGzFZH5OZs=&emci=07e32372-f846-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=435adcfe-0d4b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=5119200)**
| | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38875529/317402007/1487561253?refcode=MH_EM_PT_1MO_211121_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzVhZGNmZS0wZDRiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dTgfq4_0bO5KtoCHYt_WlxTrUUhtFwu7ckGzFZH5OZs=&emci=07e32372-f846-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=435adcfe-0d4b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=5119200)
---

My plan to improve education as your U.S. Senator includes investing in teacher pay and development.

Working as a dedicated mentor to youth and young women from under-resourced communities — I know how many kids are currently being underserved. Teachers are overstretched, underpaid, and not given the support they need.

**[Supporting our teachers better is essential for our kids' learning and development. Please be one of the 1,000 people I want to sign the petition today to take a stand for education.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38875531/317402010/1487561253?refcode=MH_EM_PT_1MO_211121_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzVhZGNmZS0wZDRiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dTgfq4_0bO5KtoCHYt_WlxTrUUhtFwu7ckGzFZH5OZs=&emci=07e32372-f846-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=435adcfe-0d4b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=5119200)**

Thank you for support,
Madison

clean_body: | Growing up in rural Stilwell, my family instilled the importance of education in me from a young age. That wasn’t always easy — to put myself through college, I had to work four jobs — but it is essential to create more opportunities for Oklahoma’s children. I was lucky to have a strong foundation in my local, public schools, but I know that future generations won’t get that unless we invest right away. With Oklahoma ranked near the bottom of states nationwide for education, this must be a primary focus of our leaders. | | My plan to improve education as your U.S. Senator includes investing in teacher pay and development. Working as a dedicated mentor to youth and young women from under-resourced communities — I know how many kids are currently being underserved. Teachers are overstretched, underpaid, and not given the support they need. Thank you for support, Madison | = | = Our country is facing major challenges that demand action from servant leaders to work together to build on America’s legacy. Madison is running for Senate to work towards the promise of the American dream and represent Oklahomans who have been left behind by self-serving politicians. Together, united by a common set of values, we can work to fight inequities, secure and defend our country, and build a better future. Help support her campaign by = Paid for by Oklahomans for Madison Oklahomans for Madison PO Box 2601 Oklahoma City, OK 73101 United States **

name: Team Heinrich
subject: [Add your name] Ban school lunch shaming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38875532/317402009/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211121_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzVhZGNmZS0wZDRiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NIuu1rPDqwbKmLl1Sg_QqyfRor5IkWaNoX6JPd-xDYc=&emci=d745cc5e-e24a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=475adcfe-0d4b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=252045)

Folks, there is no place for lunch shaming in our country. Schools should never punish students who can’t afford to pay their meal debt. **Yet we’ve heard story after story of damaging practices like stopping students from graduating or even selling the debt to a collection agency — causing more harm to families’ finances and credit.** Martin is a major advocate in fighting to end school lunch shaming. Now, he’s joined his colleagues from the New Mexico congressional delegation in calling on the U.S. Department of Agriculture to ban school lunch shaming, billing children, and allowing collection agencies to charge interest or fees on top of existing debt. **[**Show your support for banning lunch shaming by adding your name next to Martin’s:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38875534/317402013/1630317030?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211121_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzVhZGNmZS0wZDRiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NIuu1rPDqwbKmLl1Sg_QqyfRor5IkWaNoX6JPd-xDYc=&emci=d745cc5e-e24a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=475adcfe-0d4b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=252045)** | [ADD YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38875536/317402015/1630317030?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211121_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzVhZGNmZS0wZDRiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NIuu1rPDqwbKmLl1Sg_QqyfRor5IkWaNoX6JPd-xDYc=&emci=d745cc5e-e24a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=475adcfe-0d4b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=252045)

clean_body: Folks, there is no place for lunch shaming in our country. Schools should never punish students who can’t afford to pay their meal debt. Yet we’ve heard story after story of damaging practices like stopping students from graduating or even selling the debt to a collection agency — causing more harm to families’ finances and credit. Martin is a major advocate in fighting to end school lunch shaming. Now, he’s joined his colleagues from the New Mexico congressional delegation in calling on the U.S. Department of Agriculture to ban school lunch shaming, billing children, and allowing collection agencies to charge interest or fees on top of existing debt. | — Team Heinrich | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. | | We know the results of 2021 weren’t what we wanted or expected, but we’re not letting that slow us down heading into 2022. We’re learning from what went wrong and growing on our successes. The Democratic Party of Virginia has big plans to wrap up 2021 and kick off 2022 strong. We’re holding post-election debriefs across the Commonwealth to hear from supporters like you, Derek, about their 2021 elections experience and how they think we can improve in 2022. While we’re reflecting on 2021, we have to keep moving towards a successful 2022. **The path to holding onto the majority in Congress runs through Virginia** and with folks like Amanda Chase stepping into a congressional race, we’re a little worried. We know we can protect Congresspeople like Abigail Spanberger, Elaine Luria, and Jennifer Wexton if we start working now to out-hustle and out-organize the GOP, but we can’t do that without your help, Derek. **[Can we count on you to make a contribution to help us start 2022 off on the right foot by investing early to protect our representatives in Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38875891/317403913/-2066471335?refcode=dpva-em-211121-start&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDBmNTYyZi0xMjRiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5HwxGV2EZ3raA5QBRYLBCT32_iNlYDjv4hwnSifrYxk=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Wade is still5 signatures short in 18326 -- and the deadline is tonight! Please, both Joe and Kamala are counting on YOU to take a stand: "Roe v. Wade is under attack and we need to fight back." \- Vice President Kamala Harris ACTION NEEDED: If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! name: Val Demings
subject: Friend, I need to respond to Rubio's attacks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Senate control is on the line – and I can't win this race alone.
| | |
---
I'm concerned, friend. Marco Rubio has unleashed more attack ads, and they are a total distortion of who I am and what I stand for.

Unfortunately, Republican ads have a habit of resonating with the same voters I need to win. **And if I don't have the resources to reach Floridians, it could destroy my chances of defeating Marco Rubio and defending our Senate majority. **

With polling already showing me two points behind Rubio, I cannot afford to miss my $25,000 midnight fundraising goal – but I'm still falling short as of 5 p.m. My team pulled your supporter record, so please take a look at where things stand:
| | **SUPPORTER RECORD**
---
EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com
DONATION STATUS: **PENDING**
SUGGESTED CONTRIBUTION: $5
DEADLINE: 11:59 p.m.
---
|
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38876260/317406154/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1737-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjc4MDcxMy0xNzRiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hstng75vRAWqt8H-q_-v3Es1aZGOS7yOUoNahHV5Gww=)

Friend, CNN is calling Florida's Senate seat among the most likely to flip. The Cook Political Report even _increased_ my chances of winning. But Florida Senate races are won on the margins (just 10,033 votes in 2018) – so without the resources to counter Republican attack ads like this, all the grassroots the momentum I'm building could disappear in the blink of an eye.
**Senate control is on the line – and I can't win this race alone. So I'm asking for your immediate support:[Please donate $5 or more – whatever you can spare to close in on my midnight fundraising goal – so I can defeat Marco Rubio and flip Florida blue. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38876261/317406155/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1737-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjc4MDcxMy0xNzRiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hstng75vRAWqt8H-q_-v3Es1aZGOS7yOUoNahHV5Gww=)**

name: Blue Senate Update (via MaggieHassan.com)
subject: BREAKING: Mike Pence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
**"We are on the verge of another great Republican comeback. It starts right here in New Hampshire...and we are going to [win back the Senate] in 2022." _\-- Mike Pence_** | | [Rush $5 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38876286/317406345/-1803038125?refcode=e20211121_pence-a&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODg4NjRmYS0xNzRiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OopnkzCE_kI72EkkZDK8yr9uWWuzgpVPVffrWLqAgBY=)

Folks -- Mike Pence just announced that he’s headlining a GOP fundraiser that will raise massive amounts of money to try and flip New Hampshire red.
This is Mike Pence’s second visit to the Granite State in just a few months. He said so himself: **New Hampshire is the number one target** for the GOP in 2022.
With our 50-50 Senate majority and the national environment looking extremely difficult for Democrats, we can’t let Republicans gain momentum in New Hampshire.
Mike Pence, Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the full force of the GOP are raising tens of millions of dollars to take back the Senate -- and they’ve already spent over $4.5 million in attack ads against Maggie Hassan.
We can’t match their mega-bucks, but we need a strong showing of grassroots support to fight back.
**[Folks, moments like this can make or break our campaign, and we need your support. Rush $5 or more right now ahead of Mike Pence’s visit so we can stand up to the GOP and keep our Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38876287/317406346/-1803038125?refcode=e20211121_pence-a&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODg4NjRmYS0xNzRiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OopnkzCE_kI72EkkZDK8yr9uWWuzgpVPVffrWLqAgBY=)**

Folks --

Here’s the situation → Tim Ryan is running to flip Ohio blue and expand
our Democratic Senate majority. The Wall Street Journal even called him
Democrats’ most important candidate of 2022.

Here’s the problem → Donations have significantly slowed, and we’re pacing
way behind our end-of-month goal. With polls showing a tight race, this is
the worst time to come up short.

Here’s the solution → We need as many grassroots supporters as possible to
make a donation. If we can raise the funds we need to fight off the GOP’s
attacks, we’ll be in a strong position to win this competitive race.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6022?t=1007&akid=1489%2E3611125%2EAe7l6H ]Donate $25 (or more, or less!) to help us reach our critical goal
before time runs out. We need 357 more people to step up today, and Tim’s
counting on you to be one of them.

name: Wendy Rittenhouse
subject: FREE!
body:
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58833621:Jk5t042QN:m:1:3298722022:D354082DFD4ED30EC24222CC8B029EA8:r)
---
|
---
Peter,

**Kyle was just ACQUITTED and is now officially FREE!**

This was a victory for the truth, for justice, and for every American's God-given and unalienable right of self-defense.

We are so overcome with emotion, and as hard as that was, we are thankful.

We are thankful for the millions of Americans who stood with Kyle from the start.

We are thankful for the many others who watched the trial with an open mind, realized that they had been lied to for a year and a half, and spoke out.

And we are thankful to the jury which put aside bias, considered the facts, and came to the right decision.

Now, we will try to return to something that resembles a normal life, **however that requires one more major push to settle our case-related debts and pay off what we hope will be our final legal bills.**

**[So please, take all that positive energy I know you're feeling and make an urgent donation to help us close this very ugly chapter in our lives.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58833621:Jk5t042QN:m:1:3298722022:D354082DFD4ED30EC24222CC8B029EA8:r)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58833621:Jk5t042QN:m:1:3298722022:D354082DFD4ED30EC24222CC8B029EA8:r)
|
---
Any funds left over will be transferred into Kyle's scholarship fund so that he'll be able to graduate from college debt-free.

You'll be hearing from us again, but for now, and from the bottom of our hearts, thank you. Thank you. Thank you.

With love,

Wendy Rittenhouse
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58833621:Jk5t042QN:m:1:3298722022:D354082DFD4ED30EC24222CC8B029EA8:r)

name: Andy Ngo
subject: Antifa's Back- We Need Your Help
body:
I was one of the first civilians savagely beaten by lawless Antifa thugs. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6508%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=4HL3ZZjMOARsy0bNa2kicg&sysid=1)
My fellow concerned American, I was one of the first civilians savagely beaten by lawless Antifa thugs. And unless we do something to stop them today, I’ll be far from the last. **_[That’s why I’m asking you to donate $35 or more today to help me fund my landmark lawsuit that will bring Antifa and their members to justice.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67259%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iVAw37uoz90gr59YAgucEg&sysid=1) _** **You see, I was at Antifa’s “ground zero” in the summer of 2019.** This was before most Americans had ever heard of the Antifa movement, but they’d caused havoc before. I went to an Antifa “protest” as a journalist, to document and report on the event. As soon as I arrived, I feared for my safety. The mob was angry and looking for a fight. Most of them wore masks -- and not the kind we’re forced today because of coronavirus. They wanted to act like criminals without getting caught. Many had on helmets and makeshift armor. Some carried weapons like metal pipes, chains, crowbars, and even bricks. I was scared, but I had a job to do, so I pressed on. **People like you needed to know what was happening. ** But I didn’t go unnoticed for long. Somebody recognized me and jeers quickly rose through the crowd. “F*** you, Andy Ngo!” and “Go home, fascist!” I tried to escape, but it was too late. **Projectiles started flying. Then came the fists. ** Before I knew it, I was being punched, kicked, and hit with flying objects. I tried to protect my head, but I did not strike back as I knew that would only escalate the situation and put me in more danger. Not to mention they stole my camera. What they did to me is unacceptable. But this last summer, it became much worse than I could’ve ever imagined as Antifa set fire to entire cities for weeks on end. **And now, we’re watching Antifa and similar groups threaten mass riots and violence across the country.**
**[Will you donate $35 or more to help me cover the costs of my lawsuit against Antifa?](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67250%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sL8ieMUdpr63y698RlkCWA&sysid=1)** This is bigger than me alone. You see, after I got away from the mob, police finally showed up to question me, but my attackers stole all my evidence. Later, cell phone footage from a bystander surfaced online. Thank goodness! The video captured the attack, clear as day. I hoped I’d get the justice I deserved. Wrong. To this day, over a year later, my attackers are walking free. Portland police did nothing. No charges. No convictions. No justice. It’s not much of a surprise, though. You see, radical politicians have long-since bowed to the dangerous mob that terrorizes their streets. And now, as you and I are watching Antifa’s nationwide takeover, more and more politicians across the country are following suit. It’s so bad that the justice system is buckling under the pressure of threats of violence from these disgusting thugs. We have to stop them and make them face real, legal consequences for their destructive actions before they get to you and your family. [_**That’s why I hope you’ll join the fight by donating $35 or more to fund my landmark lawsuit against Antifa and their members.**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67251%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DFBUm8vAo2%2fpLZD8Tf%2fPdA&sysid=1) Because Antifa wants the end of America as we know it -- and they’ll stop at nothing to get it. Believe me when I say that’s not an overstatement. Some members are avowed socialists or communists. But many are much worse - open anarchists who want to tear down our society and remake it in their own twisted vision. By any means necessary, **_Rioting. Destruction. Mayhem. _** And they know, as long as they choose politically favored protests to co-opt, the media and politicians will never have the guts to denounce their violence or hold them accountable. It’s a sick strategy, but very smart - because so far, they’ve been right! **For the most part, they’ve gotten off scot-free.**** ** Our politicians and media are treating this deranged terrorist group like peaceful protestors! As we’ve seen, their riots will only spread and intensify if Antifa continues to escape consequences. **So now I’m taking justice into my own hands - with the help of the talented lawyers at the Center for American Liberty. ** And, as I mentioned, we’re suing Portland’s Antifa Chapter. We’ve made a lot of progress in this case, but we’re far from victory. [**_You can be a part of bringing Antifa to justice with a donation of $35 or more today._**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67252%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=y0ClgQjc83jjTowePVGWWA&sysid=1) Though I’m seeking justice for myself, the impact of this case could be so much larger. This is about standing up for our country when our own leaders won’t. This is about saving America as we know it and keeping you and your family safe. And this is just the first blow we intend to deliver. By taking them to court for the attack against me we can prove they are NOT untouchable. [**_Can I count on you to donate $35 or more to fund this critical lawsuit?_ ** ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67253%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Vd8L8z%2b%2bDli2KpUoONAbKw&sysid=1) Please don’t wait - if we don’t fight back and win now, these violent thugs will be in EVERY city across America, destroying everything and everyone in their path. Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, Andy Ngo Investigative Journalist P.S. I know firsthand that America’s troubles with Antifa aren’t over-- _**they’re just beginning**_. Today, we can make them face the consequences that left-wing politicians refuse to dole out.[ **Please donate as generously as you can right away.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67254%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rZnmY0kdNX5QYmsXniCbBA&sysid=1) [**DONATE NOW**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67265%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IAMmL1es9ubf6LFqvPABlg&sysid=1) [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67266%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YPnqRM2hMKN6T3C%2bSOQGKQ&sysid=1) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67267%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UThPyI7ST8fP97CnGpMk3w&sysid=1) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
(C) The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67268%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RmluRHL9SYe2ULxUxqwqpA&sysid=1) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6508%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=4HL3ZZjMOARsy0bNa2kicg&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6508%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=4HL3ZZjMOARsy0bNa2kicg&sysid=1)

name: Brent Bozell
subject: The Media continues lying about Kyle Rittenhouse
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58828496:6fpxR42NC:m:1:3253819041:81CD88DEE4A3B3FA493F4850CE334A06:r)
Peter,

The liberal media is attacking the Rittenhouse trial with everything they have:

name: Laura Loomer
subject: 135 Republicans want YOU to be Red Flagged
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
body:
Some of the most supposed “stalwart” Republicans voted to pass federal Red Flag gun laws, including many members of Congress who have made names for themselves within the America First movement.
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/NorFm0elGoQc892892hn5QKGhQ/XB6peXfMWHuaeYyyAvqV4A)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/NorFm0elGoQc892892hn5QKGhQ/XB6peXfMWHuaeYyyAvqV4A) Why have a Republican Party if they don’t fight for our Constitutional rights . . . especially our 2nd Amendment?

Some of the most supposed “stalwart” Republicans voted to pass federal Red Flag gun laws, including many members of Congress who have made names for themselves within the America First movement.

In total, 135 Republicans voted for Red Flag laws!

We need change and BOLD leadership in the Republican Party, and that’s why I’m leading the **HOSTILE TAKEOVER** of the GOP! [**Support my congressional race today so we can get started!**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/NorFm0elGoQc892892hn5QKGhQ/XB6peXfMWHuaeYyyAvqV4A)

| [**SEND LAURA LOOMER
TO CONGRESS**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/NorFm0elGoQc892892hn5QKGhQ/XB6peXfMWHuaeYyyAvqV4A)
---

Do these Republicans think we can trust the FBI and other government agencies with the power to Red Flag Americans?

I know one Republican who does not! Congressman Paul Gosar wrote a letter to Attorney General Merrick Garland on my behalf as I’m a victim of the FBI’s political Red Flagging.

Without notice or cause, I was placed in the FBI’s National Instant Criminal Background Check System (NICS), which could have led to my arrest and conviction if I had been found to be in possession of a firearm.

Rep. Gosar asked, “ _Was the FBI trying to entrap Ms. Loomer, and how many other American citizens who are also in the FBI NICS database have not yet been notified that they have also been banned from owning or possessing firearms?_ ”

The same has happened to countless other Americans, including my former employer and friend, James O’Keefe.

Yet, with a mountain of evidence to NEVER trust the federal government with the power of Red Flagging Americans, **ONE HUNDRED AND THIRTY-FIVE Republicans voted for it**!

What’s up with that??

It doesn’t matter if it’s incompetence in not properly and fully reading legislation, or full-blown betrayal, you and I both know that the GOP needs a RADICAL transformation – and it starts with getting America First Fighters like me elected to Congress!

I have just days left to [hit my fundraising goals for November](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/NorFm0elGoQc892892hn5QKGhQ/XB6peXfMWHuaeYyyAvqV4A) – and the more I speak out about betrayals like this in the GOP – the more the establishment fights me to keep me out.

[**SEND LAURA LOOMER
TO CONGRESS**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/NorFm0elGoQc892892hn5QKGhQ/XB6peXfMWHuaeYyyAvqV4A)
---

When I’m in Congress, you can always count on me to fight for your Second Amendment rights and I will actively and aggressively work against the political weaponization of the FBI and all Red Flag measures.

[**Will you double-down today and make the largest donation that you can?**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/NorFm0elGoQc892892hn5QKGhQ/XB6peXfMWHuaeYyyAvqV4A)

I would greatly appreciate it.

Thanks again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

[**SEND LAURA LOOMER
TO CONGRESS**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/NorFm0elGoQc892892hn5QKGhQ/XB6peXfMWHuaeYyyAvqV4A)
---

subject: NOT GUILTY.
body:
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6504%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=G9JCK0HkcPa2b%2bVqOeYtlA&sysid=1)
| | | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67261%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oe%2bYK3NY%2fdyfVI%2bHORgXjw&sysid=1)
---
|
---
Friend,

**Kyle was just ACQUITTED and is now officially FREE!**

This was a victory for the truth, for justice, and for every American's God-given and unalienable right of self-defense.

We are so overcome with emotion, and as hard as that was, we are thankful.

We are thankful for the millions of Americans who stood with Kyle from the start.

We are thankful for the many others who watched the trial with an open mind, realized that they had been lied to for a year and a half, and spoke out.

And we are thankful to the jury which put aside bias, considered the facts, and came to the right decision.

Now, we will try to return to something that resembles a normal life - **however that requires one more major push to settle our case-related debts and pay off what we hope will be our final legal bills.**

**[So please, take all that positive energy I know you're feeling and make an urgent donation to help us close this very ugly chapter in our lives.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67262%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mn9f51BwkzlwQ60vzBGDCQ&sysid=1)**
|

|
---
Any funds left over will be transferred into Kyle's scholarship fund so that he'll be able to graduate from college debt-free.

You'll be hearing from us again, but for now, and from the bottom of our hearts - thank you. Thank you. Thank you.

With love,

Wendy Rittenhouse

name: Ben Shapiro
subject: Violence from leftists....
body:
Peter, Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It's never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics. That's why it's of utmost importance that I hear back from you today. I'm no stranger to the authoritarian attitudes on campus; I famously felt the brunt of it when conservative students invited me to speak on the University of California, Berkeley campus. [**HELP US FIGHT THE RADICAL LEFT**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58833631:6z0tg42DN:m:1:3298722022:5621820450115FD2AAE0C73246A4BF2C:r) Radical leftist groups like Antifa vowed to riot and cause harm to others. The fear of violence from leftist agitators was so great that:
* It cost $600,000 in security expenses and required hundreds of policemen to ensure that agitators didn't disrupt or try to cause violence at my speech.
* The University shut down six buildings on campus during my speech and erected concrete barricades (YES, a wall) to secure the Berkeley campus.
* For the first time in 20 years, the City of Berkeley voted to allow the use of pepper spray against violent protesters.
* In the end, police arrested nine leftists for trying to sneak banned weapons into our event--with the likely intent to do harm.

It's no longer just about the Left trying to suppress your conservative views on campus. It's about using the threat of violence to silence the conservative values you and I share. Meanwhile, schools roll out the red carpet for leftists like Angela Davis, Bill Ayers, Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and Bernie Sanders. At Berkeley, taxpayer-funded school administrators tried to derail my event from even taking place. They told me that they didn't have a lecture hall available, which was a lie. School administrators even cut the venue in half by not allowing students to sit in the balcony--a dirty tactic to minimize attendance. _**The good news is the radical Left 's attempts to silence me completely backfired.**_**** More than 600 students showed up, and we were able to host an engaging and civil event. Then, OVER 10 MILLION PEOPLE watched my speech online (that's more viewers than any of the major evening newscasts). This victory for the Conservative Movement would have never happened if it weren't for the **Young America 's Foundation** **(YAF)**. When Berkeley tried to illegally block me from coming to campus, YAF sued the university --**and won.** But the radicals who rioted and tried to incite violence at Berkeley are relentless. Their stranglehold on America's universities has not yet been broken. **Young America 's Foundation** has been an incredible partner in making sure I am able to share our conservative values with students on campuses across the country. In fact, I speak on campuses **_exclusively_** through YAF because I know YAF has the experience and leadership necessary to run the nation's leading campus lecture program. Today YAF needs your help. **[Will you contribute $35 today to ensure that YAF can continue to present speakers, including Dr. Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich, Senator Ted Cruz, and many others to high school and college students? Without you, the mission to pass along our conservative values to future generations will stall out.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58833631:6z0tg42DN:m:1:3298722022:5621820450115FD2AAE0C73246A4BF2C:r)** Let me tell you a little bit more about what YAF does to advance conservative ideas. Speaking to an audience of Young America's Foundation students, Vice President Mike Pence noted, "Since its founding in 1960, YAF has been a bulwark of American greatness." YAF valiantly defends the values we share by educating impressionable young people who have been ideologically poisoned by leftist propaganda for decades, by the very teachers and professors they're told to trust. YAF's team is the best at what they do. They are _**#1: the LARGEST and MOST effective conservative youth outreach organization in America**._ Here's why:
* YAF introduces young audiences to the biggest names in the Conservative Movement through their leading campus lecture program. YAF speakers are the most inspiring conservative voices in America, including **Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich,** YAF's Ronald Reagan Presidential Scholar and Vice President **Mike Pence, Dinesh D 'Souza, Lila Rose, Steve Forbes, **Lt. Col.**Allen West** , Speaker**Newt Gingrich, Michael Knowles, Dana Loesch, James O 'Keefe, **NFL star and Congressman **Burgess Owens, Star Parker,** Fox News's**Jesse Watters,** and many others.
* YAF teaches **_millions of students_ **across the nation YOUR conservative values through breakthrough conferences, training seminars, and campus activism initiatives and activities. (In fact, YAF is the only Conservative Movement organization that has a full suite of conservative educational programs for high school students!)
* And YAF preserves and protects President Reagan's ranch in Santa Barbara, California and Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois. They saved these national treasures so young people can learn about Ronald Reagan's lasting accomplishments.

_No other organization reaches conservative students with foundational American ideas on a bigger scale than Young America 's Foundation._ _That 's why I prefer YAF to be my sole sponsor for campus events._ They fight for the right to ensure alternative voices are heard on college campuses. They stop campuses from being turned into Leftist echo chambers. I am glad I have YAF on my side and the side of the students. But YAF can't do this alone. As the Left continues to stoop to desperate new lows to silence conservatives, it's become more important than ever that our values are shared with the next generation of thought leaders. We both know that the Left doesn't want a fair discussion of ideas. But that's why YAF needs your help today. At any moment, a scheduled event could get shut down by campus radicals or administrators, and the YAF team must be ready to engage them on a moment's notice. [**Will you contribute $35 or more today so that YAF 's rapid response team will always be ready to leap into action the next time leftists decide to shut down free speech and deprive students of the chance to hear your conservative ideas?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58833631:6z0tg42DN:m:1:3298722022:5621820450115FD2AAE0C73246A4BF2C:r) Friend, a donation of $35 or whatever you choose does more than you know. The impact amplifying conservative voices will have on the future of our country can't be overstated. I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today. Partnering with YAF today is our opportunity to win a generation that values freedom. I can't think of a better investment. Ronald Reagan stated, "There is no better way to establish hope for the future than to enlighten young minds." I look forward to hearing back from you. -Ben Ben Shapiro [**Will you support Young America 's Foundation with a contribution of $35, $50, $100, or even $1000 today, to save this generation by presenting conservative ideas to students across the country?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58833631:6z0tg42DN:m:1:3298722022:5621820450115FD2AAE0C73246A4BF2C:r) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58833631:6z0tg42DN:m:1:3298722022:5621820450115FD2AAE0C73246A4BF2C:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58833631:6z0tg42DN:m:1:3298722022:5621820450115FD2AAE0C73246A4BF2C:r) | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58833632:6z0tg42DN:m:1:3298722022:5621820450115FD2AAE0C73246A4BF2C:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58833633:6z0tg42DN:m:1:3298722022:5621820450115FD2AAE0C73246A4BF2C:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58833634:6z0tg42DN:m:1:3298722022:5621820450115FD2AAE0C73246A4BF2C:r)
---|---|---
**[www.yaf.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58833635:6z0tg42DN:m:1:3298722022:5621820450115FD2AAE0C73246A4BF2C:r)**

11480 Commerce Park Dr, 6th Floor
Reston, VA 20191-1556

**[Privacy Policy](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58833636:6z0tg42DN:m:1:3298722022:5621820450115FD2AAE0C73246A4BF2C:r) **

subject: Do you have a minute?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
If every patriot I’m emailing doesn’t step up before Midnight, Tim Scott will miss his Mid Month Deadline and our chances of restoring a Conservative Majority in the Senate will be DOOMED!
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?2wmr0--fgxr-4qqlpo9&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)
|
---
| | | Hey, Fellow Conservative, do you have a minute?

Republicans are coming up on a very important deadline and are currently pacing behind the Democrats. This is the worst-case scenario for Republicans in battleground elections.
---
| | | [HELP REPUBLICANS CATCH UP](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2wmr0-1lsx4-4qqlpo9/ "HELP REPUBLICANS CATCH UP")
---
| | | [CHIP IN NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2wmr0-1lsx5-4qqlpo0/ "CHIP IN NOW")
---
**My friend Tim Scott is one of the Republicans who needs our help. He’s facing a tough reelection and Democrats want nothing more than to unseat him in the Senate.**
**I’ll get right to it, Fellow Conservative, if every patriot I’m emailing doesn’t step up before Midnight, Tim Scott will miss his Mid Month Deadline and our chances of restoring a Conservative Majority in the Senate will be DOOMED!**
We can’t afford to let this happen. America needs Tim Scott’s leadership in the Senate. **[So if you can, please rush emergency funds toward Tim Scott’s Mid Month Goal NOW!](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2wmr0-1lsx6-4qqlpo1/ "So if you can, please rush emergency funds toward Tim Scott’s Mid Month Goal NOW!")**

Republicans across the country are gearing up for the fight of their lives. We are working to restore a Conservative Majority across all levels of government, but we need your help.

Every supporter and every contribution can and will make a difference in the next election.

Reaching our Mid-Month Deadline is essential in our plan to defeat the radical Left once and for all. **[Fellow Conservative, can I count on you to step up and help me ensure victory for Republicans?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2wmr0-1lsx7-4qqlpo2/ "Fellow Conservative, can I count on you to step up and help me ensure victory for Republicans?")**

Thank you for your continued support of efforts to take back the Majority and protect our Conservative values.

To victory,

Congressman Dan Crenshaw
---
| |

* * *

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2wmr0-1lsx8-4qqlpo3/ "DONATE NOW")
---

Fellow Conservative, there is less than one year until Election Day.

Republicans are ready for a RED WAVE to win back the House and Senate.

But Democrats are raising MILLIONS from wealthy donors. They will do ANYTHING to stop Republicans from winning.

I’m asking for your help to overcome the Democrats’ fundraising advantage and finally stop Joe Biden’s agenda in Congress.

**[Will you be the patriot who puts Republicans over the top and saves our country?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2wmr0-1lsx9-4qqlpo4/ "Will you be the patriot who puts Republicans over the top and saves our country?")**

Thanks for your tremendous support,
Tim Scott

body:
| | | **[We can't believe our eyes! Since Republicans launched over 400 voter suppression bills across the country to undermine our right to vote, Presidents Biden AND Obama have BOTH called on us to fight back. They're asking every last Democrat to help us STOP these Republican schemes and PROTECT our critical Democratic House Majority. So we're calling for 1,750 more gifts before our midnight deadline in just 11 hours to answer their calls, DEFEAT House Republicans, and make Joe and Barack proud. Will you step up with $3 to defend our House Majority? >>](https://links.e.dccc.)**

_We need to move quickly._

**FIRST:**

After Republicans rushed over 400 voter suppression bills across the country to suppress the vote, President Biden delivered an **URGENT** call to action:

[](https://links.e.dccc.)

**THEN: **

President Obama **BROKE** his silence and joined him in the fight:

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/j~)

**NOW:**

**We 're calling for 1,750 more gifts before our midnight deadline in just 11 hours to answer Joe and Barack's calls and protect our House Majority.**

When two of our most beloved Democrats ask for our help --_we wouldn 't dare let them down._

****[So will you stand with Joe and Barack and rush $3 before our midnight deadline to defend our House Majority?>>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/gpgkTR94~~t~)**

clean_body: Tim Ryan is in denial. Peter, Tim Ryan is TRIGGERED. If this email is any indication, Tim Ryan is more desperate than ever to take me down because he knows that I am the frontrunner. His team said it themselves, Peter: “Mandel is the only Republican beating Tim in the polls.” Here’s the truth: the only one who’s not “living in reality” is Tim Ryan. I am beating Tim Ryan because I am confronting the REAL issues facing America today, and I REFUSE to bow down to the Biden Administration’s socialist agenda. Tim Ryan is nothing more than a puppet for the far left who will never put Americans first, which is the LAST thing we need in Washington. Tim Ryan wants to raise $1,392 by midnight, so let’s one-up him by raising $1,400. We MUST keep weak politicians like him out of the Senate, Peter, but I can’t do it without you. That’s why I will be 6X matching ALL donations made by MIDNIGHT. 6X MATCHED for TONIGHT ONLY: Do-nothing politicians like Tim Ryan have plagued our country for too long. We can’t let him win, Peter. Thank you, Josh Mandel \------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ From: "Team Ryan" To: Peter, Subject: the GOP frontrunner Folks -- Let’s talk about Tim’s extremist opponent and the Republican frontrunner who believes the 2020 election was stolen from Donald Trump -- Josh Mandel. Recently, Mandel said, “there's no such thing as separation of church and state” and called to shut down public schools and “put schools in churches.” No such thing as separation of church and state? As Tim would say, Josh ain’t living in reality. Josh also compared President Biden’s administration to Nazi Germany and said the Gestapo would show up at people’s doors to enforce mask mandates. Mandel’s comments on immigrants are equally appalling. He’s said that he believes “George Soros is funding, Obama is coordinating, and Biden is enabling an invasion of our country.” Oh, and he also compared immigrants to alligators. Folks, these dangerous comments are just a small sample of Mandel’s radical and inflammatory statements. He doesn’t deserve to represent Ohio and has no place serving in the Senate. But Mandel is the only Republican beating Tim in the polls. And he has the backing of not one, but TWO super PACs that have already spent $1 million on TV ads to ensure he wins the GOP primary. We urgently need our grassroots supporters to step up and counteract the big money flooding into this battleground Senate race. \-- Team Ryan Paid for by Team Josh A joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Citizens for Josh Mandel, Inc., Justice Opportunity Strength Honor PAC, and Shelby County Republican Party Federal Account. Hello,
If you voted for Chuck Grassley the first time he ran for office, you’d have to be at least 87-years-old. That’s how long Senator Chuck Grassley has been a politician.
And over his several-decades-long career, Grassley has taken millions of dollars in campaign contributions from corporate PACs and special interests. Wall Street, Big Pharma, insurance companies, the NRA... you name it, he’s taken their money.
**Democrat Mike Franken recently announced he’s running against Chuck Grassley for Senate in Iowa, and the latest polling shows he can win: Just 27% of Iowa voters want to reelect Grassley next year!**
But Mike’s not taking corporate PAC money. If he’s going to go up against Grassley and McConnell’s millions and win, he’s relying on grassroots donors like you to give instead.
**We’re facing another critical fundraising deadline, but right now, we’re still $3,429 short of our goal and what Mike needs to win. If we’re going to hit our goal and turn Iowa blue, Mike is counting on you to give right now:**

clean_body: | | | | Hello, If you voted for Chuck Grassley the first time he ran for office, you’d have to be at least 87-years-old. That’s how long Senator Chuck Grassley has been a politician. And over his several-decades-long career, Grassley has taken millions of dollars in campaign contributions from corporate PACs and special interests. Wall Street, Big Pharma, insurance companies, the NRA... you name it, he’s taken their money. Democrat Mike Franken recently announced he’s running against Chuck Grassley for Senate in Iowa, and the latest polling shows he can win: Just 27% of Iowa voters want to reelect Grassley next year! But Mike’s not taking corporate PAC money. If he’s going to go up against Grassley and McConnell’s millions and win, he’s relying on grassroots donors like you to give instead. We’re facing another critical fundraising deadline, but right now, we’re still $3,429 short of our goal and what Mike needs to win. name: Nikki Fried
subject: This is how we save lives
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Team,

Last week, I was proud to file a joint brief in support of a lawsuit challenging Florida’s dangerous gun preemption law.

The law prevents local governments from passing gun safety laws to protect residents. In the face of unspeakable tragedy and increased gun violence, it’s unconscionable that this law remains on the books.

As Commissioner of Agriculture, I’ve done all that I can to fight gun violence in our state, kicking the NRA out of gun permitting for the first time in years.

Today, I’m asking you to join me. Click here to sign our petition opposing Florida’s dangerous gun preemption law. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/CxoCFAQFEUCcssMf1IwmKg2]
https://twitter.com/NikkiFried/status/1460718323478450183?s=20 [https://twitter.com/NikkiFried/status/1460718323478450183?s=20]Governor DeSantis hasn’t acted to fight gun violence and keep our communities safe. Meanwhile, he called legislators to Tallahassee last week to help him score political points.

Click here to join me by adding your name to oppose Florida’s gun preemption law. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/CxoCFAQFEUCcssMf1IwmKg2]

Thanks,

NIkki Fried

Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-nov-2021?refcode=gunpetitionfooter]

name: Team Jayapal
subject: Add your name to thank Pramila
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
On Friday, Pramila helped carry the transformative Build Back Better Act over the finish line in the House. It was a historic vote that delivers on the promises that Democrats made to invest in working people, families, and communities across America. **And it wouldn’t have happened without Pramila’s leadership.**
Because of her organizing and our movement’s nonstop work, we won a slew of key progressive policies in the Build Back Better Act — like affordable child care, Medicare expansion, universal pre-K, paid leave, unprecedented action on climate change, lower prescription prices, housing, and much more.
**[**So today, we’re putting together a card thanking Pramila for her committed progressive leadership. Can you take a minute and add your name to our thank you card before we send it to Pramila?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pramila-2021-thanks/?source=em20211121-822&t=1&akid=822%2E420207%2Ew4ZBGG)
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pramila-2021-thanks/?source=em20211121-822&t=2&akid=822%2E420207%2Ew4ZBGG)
We must step back and acknowledge how hard our grassroots movement fought to pass the Build Back Better Act in the House. We’ve been up against powerful interests — from Wall Street and Big Oil to Big Pharma — yet we managed to hold the line and deliver for the people because of Pramila’s leadership.
Thanks for being with us at this historic moment,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20211121-822-footer&t=3&refcode2=822_420207_w4ZBGG&akid=822%2E420207%2Ew4ZBGG)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=4&akid=822%2E420207%2Ew4ZBGG)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=822%2E420207%2Ew4ZBGG)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Josh Harder
subject: I want to tell you a story
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/wFGYTe9Sgf07OfMhzGQSzqrPznStWeZcSL3KilWgpek=/PqJMrz_crffZR3zwv6HtA8Wxy0rIjtN6YJZzJmqdkOk=?refcode=E12540-20211121-NeighborsStory-header-Immigration-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) | Hi, Peter. For far too long, our immigration system has been broken. Here in the Valley, we feel this every day. The struggle for immigration reform is personal for me - one of my fondest memories growing up in Turlock was spending time after school with my Assyrian neighbor. Her name was Nana Bitpera, and she was like a grandmother to me. My brother and I would help her pick grape leaves in her backyard and make fresh, homemade dolmas. And over plates of her delicious dolmas, she would tell us stories: about how Assyrians have made incredible contributions to global art and culture, how they were the first people to domesticate crops, and how they - quite literally! - invented the wheel. She would also tell us about how Assyrians have sadly faced centuries of persecution, which caused many of them to come to the United States for a new future where they can pursue their own American dreams. So although I can never truly understand the immigrant experience, I've felt a deep sense of kinship since childhood. And it's what drives me to do my part in creating a better future for the immigrants who are our friends, classmates, and neighbors. There are over 10,000 Dreamers in my community who are as American as you and I, but are forced to live in the shadows. I was proud to cosponsor and vote to pass the Dream and Promise Act to provide a pathway to citizenship. But I know this work is nowhere near done, which is why I'm committed to comprehensive immigration reform. It's time we fix our broken immigration system, and I know we can do it. It's what our immigrant communities who have contributed so much to our country's history and prosperity deserve. Thanks for reading,
Josh [DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/wFGYTe9Sgf07OfMhzGQSzqrPznStWeZcSL3KilWgpek=/PqJMrz_crffZR3zwv6HtA8Wxy0rIjtN6YJZzJmqdkOk=?refcode=E12540-20211121-NeighborsStory-SB-Immigration-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22)
---
* * *

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/wFGYTe9Sgf07OfMhzGQSzqrPznStWeZcSL3KilWgpek=/L6x-7BWql3sgGlFE-PNmKwR9RUp6wgiT-XuxTcOCs9s=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/wFGYTe9Sgf07OfMhzGQSzqrPznStWeZcSL3KilWgpek=/dJzZhlrH0G1-0ijLu0NItvariuWhG0T0eQXEtrHJXlg=)

Josh and his wife Pam live in Turlock where Josh grew up and delivered newspapers for the Turlock Journal. Josh was re-elected to Congress on behalf of families in the Central Valley where he's fighting to hold our government accountable, pass COVID-19 relief, and deliver on our progressive values. **[Will you help him keep up the fight in Congress by making a contribution today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/wFGYTe9Sgf07OfMhzGQSzqrPznStWeZcSL3KilWgpek=/PqJMrz_crffZR3zwv6HtA8Wxy0rIjtN6YJZzJmqdkOk=?refcode=E12540-20211121-NeighborsStory-footer-Immigration-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22)**

She would also tell us about how Assyrians have sadly faced centuries of persecution, which caused many of them to come to the United States for a new future where they can pursue their own American dreams. So although I can never truly understand the immigrant experience, I've felt a deep sense of kinship since childhood. And it's what drives me to do my part in creating a better future for the immigrants who are our friends, classmates, and neighbors. There are over 10,000 Dreamers in my community who are as American as you and I, but are forced to live in the shadows. I was proud to cosponsor and vote to pass the Dream and Promise Act to provide a pathway to citizenship. But I know this work is nowhere near done, which is why I'm committed to comprehensive immigration reform. It's time we fix our broken immigration system, and I know we can do it. It's what our immigrant communities who have contributed so much to our country's history and prosperity deserve. Thanks for reading, Josh = =

subject: We only get one chance to do this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Beto is counting on us today.
#
The first week of our campaign for Governor ends tonight — and it’s one of the most important weeks we’ll have until Election Day.
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50062?refcode=ema20211121-163526&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=163526%2E444211%2EewnHDi)
**[Donate now »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50062?refcode=ema20211121-163526&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=163526%2E444211%2EewnHDi)**
The resources we raise in this first week (thanks to generous supporters like you) will lay the groundwork for our entire campaign. They will determine the size of our campaign staff, the reach of our organizing programs, and **ultimately, whether we’ll be powerful enough to win this election.**
[If you’re able to, will you make your first donation right now? Beto is counting on all of us, and we only have one chance to end Week 1 with a major grassroots push.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50062?refcode=ema20211121-163526&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=163526%2E444211%2EewnHDi)
The stakes couldn’t be higher. Governor Greg Abbott has failed the people of this state. He’s pitted us against each other with fringe policies on abortions, guns, and mask mandates, when we need to be focused on a bigger vision for Texas — like better jobs, a world-class public education system, and expanded access to health care.

Together, we can restore a bigger, bolder vision for Texas, one with room for all of us. But it’s going to take everyone pitching in whenever we can, and this is an important milestone for our campaign.
[Please, a donation in Week 1 of our campaign will go the longest way. Will you pitch in any amount you can right away?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50062?refcode=ema20211121-163526&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=163526%2E444211%2EewnHDi)

Beto for Texas

Friend, it's obvious that Arizona deserves better than the failed leadership of Republicans like Doug Ducey and Kari Lake. We need a governor who will focus on what Arizonans truly need – from voting rights to health care to education. We need restoration of our state's potential. We need a leader we can believe in.
**Marco Lopez (D) is that leader. He's an Obama administration alum, a voting rights champion and a small business owner. And now, he's running for governor with the experience we need to flip Arizona blue and defend our democracy.**
But _POLITICO_ called his race the _most_ competitive open-seat race in the country – so he can't win without powerful grassroots support behind him. **That's why we set a goal of having 5,000 more people (like YOU!) personally endorse Marco's campaign to flip Arizona blue. We've heard from so many people already, but we still need you to join them.[With Arizona's future on the line, friend, will you join this growing movement by adding your name to endorse Marco Lopez for governor?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38877814/317423424/-89788242?code=jtk306-su-nd&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Flopez-2021-nov-strategy%3Fcode%3Djtk306-su-nd&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzE2NDIwMi0yYzRiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=is0J695Ueap6mbT4QL93nxRFj3vC8vMFK6dPO6BekuQ=&emci=d2bd708c-4c49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=5c164202-2c4b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=6085109)**

The Arizona GOP has made it clear that they'll leave no stone unturned – and no conspiracy theory un-invoked – in their desperate attempt to keep Arizona red. They've invited QAnon conspiracy theorists like Marjorie Taylor Greene to challenge our election, let Donald Trump rile up his base at a rally and suggested they would copy the worst of other states' ultra-conservative agendas to strip us of our rights.
Marco is running to fight for _all_ people – but he needs our help to win before he can defeat this rampant extremism. **Experts from Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight to the Cook Political Report agree we CAN win this race, but only if we win it together. So with so much at stake, we have to ask:**
**[Will you be one of the 5,000 more people we need to personally endorse Marco, before our midnight deadline, to help him flip Arizona blue and defeat GOP extremism?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38877816/317423426/-89788242?code=jtk306-su-nd&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Flopez-2021-nov-strategy%3Fcode%3Djtk306-su-nd&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzE2NDIwMi0yYzRiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=is0J695Ueap6mbT4QL93nxRFj3vC8vMFK6dPO6BekuQ=&emci=d2bd708c-4c49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=5c164202-2c4b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=6085109)**
Thank you,

Team Lopez

**Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:**
Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. name: Cheri Beasley
subject: I’ll bring my lived experiences to the Senate to fight for you.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
On too many fronts, the laws being made in Washington are failing our families.
#

Friends -
On too many fronts, the laws being made in Washington are failing our families.
I saw it countless times as a judge and as Chief Justice, and I hear about it every day talking to voters. We need someone who understands and has lived these experiences — not another politician or out-of-touch insider.
One of my first jobs was as a busboy at The Spaghetti Factory — working minimum wage and relying on servers to tip out. That’s how I know that raising the minimum wage to $15 an hour would change lives.
I saw up close how broken our health insurance system is when I spent countless hours on the phone as a young mom fighting to get critical medical care for my twin boys.
I’ve watched as hurricanes and extreme weather caused by climate change have destroyed communities in our state, and it’s why I’ll fight for aggressive action to combat the climate crisis.
I learned early on from my mom and grandparents about the struggle for voting rights, and in my career, I’ve seen up close and personal how our justice system fails our most vulnerable.
As your Senator, I will relentlessly pursue justice for the people and fight for your family. But first, we have to win this race, and that will require all of us to work together.
**[So if you can, please make a $3 donation to my campaign today to help us bring new leadership to North Carolina and the Senate. There is so much work to be done, and with all that’s on the line, it’s critical that we win this race in 2022.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-nov21?refcode=em211121-1-15nd&refcode2=47.357359.5BZw8T&t=1&akid=47%2E357359%2E5BZw8T)**

name: Catherine Cortez Masto
subject: I never could have imagined
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/3848?t=6&akid=941%2E878179%2EaOE3uy) When I was growing up, I never could have imagined I’d become the first Latina ever elected to the Senate. It was only possible thanks to grassroots supporters like you, friend. [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/3848?t=7&akid=941%2E878179%2EaOE3uy) My parents taught me that I could accomplish anything with hard work, honesty, and respect for others. I took that lesson and dedicated my life to public service.

They motivated me every day, and their lessons pushed my sister and I to be the first in our family to graduate college. Then I got to work defending my community.

I served two terms as Nevada’s Attorney General and then I became the first Latina and first woman from Nevada ever elected to the U.S. Senate. I won by just two points, narrowly overcoming $50 million spent by Mitch McConnell and his allies to defeat me.

Now new polling shows me 2 points behind my Trump-endorsed opponent, and CNN is calling me one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country. My race has officially been downgraded from ‘Leans Democratic’ to ‘Toss-Up,’ and I’m about to fall short of my critical midnight goal.

[**Please friend, will you rush a $5 donation right now to split between my campaign and VPP to help me defeat Donald Trump’s endorsed candidate and defend our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/3848?t=8&akid=941%2E878179%2EaOE3uy) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/3849?t=9&akid=941%2E878179%2EaOE3uy)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/3850?t=10&akid=941%2E878179%2EaOE3uy)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/3851?t=11&akid=941%2E878179%2EaOE3uy)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/3852?t=12&akid=941%2E878179%2EaOE3uy)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/3848?t=13&akid=941%2E878179%2EaOE3uy)
Mitch McConnell is only one seat away from retaking control of the Senate, which means we have zero room for error. I’m counting on your immediate support to close the polling gap by hitting this critical goal before my midnight deadline.

_¡La lucha sigue!_ The fight continues!

Catherine
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To ending partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=941%2E878179%2EaOE3uy). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=941%2E878179%2EaOE3uy).**

name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: Re: Kyle Rittenhouse
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
Do you think the jury made the right call? Let us know. I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=f099288e8f40457ead9cfa6a8bcf781b&_e=wLFBJK0cJfSOdUMgu1ZUbacjvPHPQn0dOfy6PBtx8vhkbeNwzDu39PwUW1gZbTJ0tfq3sai3X0l_bGGqLSYATNdGCrfaK0FPNVRFwxuaAp0sL4SFE3-6IHgzOpdF6u37Y-GjIxD_nMR3FcEIzE48RZBoFzP3wuiUUpI3Njjg1mb2d_cRcWotqnDup20aO3vjYH1L6Vys08UrCk1cj0pePuxEXjX0OKsO6jmp1ZTatnHJQIy0Qwp_EkEabxV-PhKBzql1fgDHXAeuQd3x_J8YayOfmVQ4m-CJhbkd6-akflpLvgMZXlJ2LRkA57byVhnkbxJFqpzRyEylBHy0I_OcLfumECT7IVRRI9yr52jFiK38Mx10TDQuywBQ-A0pa_Pml14zJyUEW9jPYSZid4op6Q6nmrrtmHKj5hBd4iokYtA9gBtF8r4ZeyxyuOYdq7aSQNU57kkjLXClk2T13lHCOBaDugQANCAUjaQw6PMuRAVDv0raJ-gkbfMBjy2gvkl575HnWQ2rlV7l5vXGWTRdvZfylRZnj6skotBH704bc1wG8n7A7d_v5YkhtlD8KaiDGNZxj4zNFi_Wkw2pSK2HJADv3TYx2ZfKKYftFT88hvg%3D)
---
Peter,

I want to take a moment to say congratulations to Kyle Rittenhouse on his full acquittal. He should never have been charged. Self-defense is not a crime.

Having seen the mayhem caused by rioters and looters in Portland and Seattle last year, **this judgement, in my opinion, sends a message to all Americans that our judicial system is working the way that it is supposed to work**.

Kyle Rittenhouse should have never gone to Kenosha, Wisconsin in the first place; the police officers of Kenosha and the national guardsmen of Wisconsin should have been able to quell the riots that broke out last summer, but the inept Democrat governor of Wisconsin --- along with governors in blue states all over the country last year -- opted not to hold looters and rioters accountable out of fear of looking racist.

**Do you think the jury got this one right? I’m curious to know your opinion.**

**[Please take 20 seconds to let me and my team know where you stand.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=f099288e8f40457ead9cfa6a8bcf781b&_e=wLFBJK0cJfSOdUMgu1ZUbacjvPHPQn0dOfy6PBtx8vhkbeNwzDu39PwUW1gZbTJ0tfq3sai3X0l_bGGqLSYATNdGCrfaK0FPNVRFwxuaAp0sL4SFE3-6IHgzOpdF6u37Y-GjIxD_nMR3FcEIzE48RZBoFzP3wuiUUpI3Njjg1mb2d_cRcWotqnDup20aO3vjYH1L6Vys08UrCk1cj0pePuxEXjX0OKsO6jmp1ZTatnHJQIy0Qwp_EkEabxV-PhKBzql1fgDHXAeuQd3x_J8YayOfmVQ4m-CJhbkd6-akflpLvgMZXlJ2LRkA57byVhnkbxJFqpzRyEylBHy0I_OcLfumECT7IVRRI9yr52jFiK38Mx10TDQuywBQ-A0pa_Pml14zJyUEW9jPYSZid4op6fb3BJ9syeWmTYRPR-DUVr-wnI3hZ5PbmSbBTfA_ug0uSM7DSgMvVUP_uj84K-dV8rtGAGpV0mmo-fXyZpkA_YV096faRJr84fJ4bbjmp4ksRs_bc74DtxeIVpB3Dc2w7VDDmVJs_frbed7jNg_wTiVuRnbASLqr29N2HopLgD63prUUicSWcp1nzDAl9bJQHDFrjkcoNxsowZmPGuXeqrk%3D)**

| [**DID THE JURY GET IT RIGHT?

clean_body: Do you think the jury made the right call? Let us know. I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | Peter, I want to take a moment to say congratulations to Kyle Rittenhouse on his full acquittal. He should never have been charged. Self-defense is not a crime. Having seen the mayhem caused by rioters and looters in Portland and Seattle last year, this judgement, in my opinion, sends a message to all Americans that our judicial system is working the way that it is supposed to work. Kyle Rittenhouse should have never gone to Kenosha, Wisconsin in the first place; the police officers of Kenosha and the national guardsmen of Wisconsin should have been able to quell the riots that broke out last summer, but the inept Democrat governor of Wisconsin --- along with governors in blue states all over the country last year -- opted not to hold looters and rioters accountable out of fear of looking racist. Do you think the jury got this one right? I’m curious to know your opinion. | Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- Alek Skarlatos is a former Oregon National Guardsman. clean_body: | | | | | Team, in times like this we have to stand together. Republicans across the country are ramping up their efforts to oust Democratic officials and hold us back from progress. In Nevada, Steve Sisolak is facing six MAGA Republican opponents who will stop at nothing to flip our state red. We need all hands on deck if we want a chance at holding them off. Voting down the ballot for Democratic candidates in 2022 is our best bet at keeping Nevada bright blue. | | | | | Since taking office Steve Sisolak has fought tirelessly to defend reproductive rights, invest in our public schools, and expand affordable health care for every Nevadan. We know that Nevadans are proud of Gov. Sisolak’s progressive accomplishments – but Republicans are determined to halt all of his progress in its tracks. Steve Sisolak is facing 6 Republican opponents who will relentlessly attack and distort his record. That’s why it’s CRUCIAL that we get an accurate sense of how this team will be voting in 2022. | | | | Thank you for your feedback, -Team Sisolak | | | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor P.O. Peter -- This month has been a whirlwind of candidate endorsements for Future Generations -- and we have even more to come. We are so proud of this group of outstanding community leaders who have stepped up to fight for the future of our country and our world. **Now it 's time to start helping them WIN and we need you with us! ** In addition to supporting new candidates, Future Generations is also focused on making sure our slate of powerhouse incumbent representatives get re-elected. Folks like Reps. Pramila Jayapal, Cori Bush, Marie Newman, and Andy Levin have been fighting for working people every day in the House of Representatives, and we need to have their backs going into this tough mid-term election season. **To do that, we really need to raise another $3,118 and close our November mid-month fundraising gap. Can we count on you to pitch in $5, $10, or $25 to catch us up?**

clean_body: | | Peter -- This month has been a whirlwind of candidate endorsements for Future Generations -- and we have even more to come. We are so proud of this group of outstanding community leaders who have stepped up to fight for the future of our country and our world. Now it 's time to start helping them WIN and we need you with us! In addition to supporting new candidates, Future Generations is also focused on making sure our slate of powerhouse incumbent representatives get re-elected. Folks like Reps. Pramila Jayapal, Cori Bush, Marie Newman, and Andy Levin have been fighting for working people every day in the House of Representatives, and we need to have their backs going into this tough mid-term election season. To do that, we really need to raise another $3,118 and close our November mid-month fundraising gap. Can we count on you to pitch in $5, $10, or $25 to catch us up? We and our candidates are running on people power, but it's still going to take money to win against corporate PACs and special interests. Most grassroots campaigns are long on volunteers and short on cash. Your support means we can provide digital tools and training to the hundreds of volunteers who offer their time to our endorsed candidates and to Future Generations. It's going to take all of us standing together to consolidate the wins from 2020 and make more ground in 2022. Thank you for joining our fight for the future. Roza | | Future Generations is a youth-founded, youth-led movement guided by the Seventh Generations philosophy, building a sustainable world for the next seven generations. And they’re not praising him for his leadership. Montanans are writing about how Rosendale “could care less about the needs in this state,” and how he “criticized and failed to support this legislation that will funnel millions of dollars to the state for infrastructure projects and high-paying jobs. He didn’t support the COVID rescue plan either, but has since taken credit for the good it has done for Montanans.” Montanans deserve a representative who actually does the job he was elected to do -- which is to fight for Montanans in DC.
