subject: Republican Rescue AVAILABLE NOW!
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
### Republican Rescue: Saving The Party From Truth Deniers, Conspiracy Theorists, and the Dangerous Policies of Joe Biden
---
| [Order Now!](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=607fe6dd7c&e=65ae29fa7e "Order Now!")
---
| [ ](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=1842099606&e=65ae29fa7e)
---
**About the Book**

Enough with the infighting, the truth-denying, the wild conspiracy claims, the looking backward, and the refusal to focus on the dangerous Biden agenda. Here’s Chris Christie’s urgent guide for recapturing Republican glory and winning elections again, told with all the New Jersey frankness and news-breaking insights that have made the two-term governor, Trump early endorser, and presidential candidate an indispensable voice and instant New York Times bestselling author.

[_Order yours today!_](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=5ae3f2a26c&e=65ae29fa7e)
| | **In the Media: Republican Rescue Release**
---
| [ ](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=b79f74cc94&e=65ae29fa7e)
---
**The Washington Post**

**Live Talk with Chris Christie**

As the Republican governor of New Jersey, one of the nation’s bluest states, Chris Christie embraced bipartisan politics. Now his focus has turned to saving his own party. In his new book, “Republican Rescue: Saving the Party from Truth Deniers, Conspiracy Theorists, and the Dangerous Policies of Joe Biden,” the former presidential candidate gives his unfiltered take on the Biden agenda and how to save the future of the GOP.

[_Watch Here_](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=4815dfb238&e=65ae29fa7e)
|
---
| [ ](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=c9c57ecb55&e=65ae29fa7e)
---
**Fox News**

**Chris Christie urges GOP to unite to defeat Democrats: 'We should not be attacking other Republicans'**

'Republican Rescue' author Chris Christie joined 'Fox & Friends,' outlining a path to victory for the GOP in 2022 and 2024.

[_Watch Here_](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=ede6865109&e=65ae29fa7e)
|
---
| | [ ](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=6fcd5c09d8&e=65ae29fa7e)
---
**The New York Times**

**What’s in Chris Christie’s New Book?**

Preview by Maggie Haberman

[_Read Now_](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=a3432552ed&e=65ae29fa7e)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=6a03d075cd&e=65ae29fa7e)
---
**The Daily Show with Trevor Noah**

**Chris Christie - Challenging Trump & GOP’s Need to Return to Truth**

Former New Jersey Governor and “Republican Rescue” author Chris Christie discusses why his party needs to return to the truth, shares if he’s comfortable running against Donald Trump, and breaks down the ways he thinks President Biden is failing.

[_Watch Here_](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=98b4961495&e=65ae29fa7e)
|

**Rittenhouse Jury Deliberates and Media's Disastrous Coverage, with Gov. Chris Christie, Robert Barnes, Andrew Branca, and Richard Baris**

[_Listen Now_](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=65beaf52bb&e=65ae29fa7e)

[_Get Your Tickets Here!_](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=d3e39a2b4b&e=65ae29fa7e)

name: Nick Rathod, Beto for Texas
subject: re: Abbott's record
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
We're less than 12 hours out from the end of our first week on the campaign trail.
#
We're less than 12 hours out from the end of our first week on the campaign trail, and we need to bring in as many grassroots donations as possible before midnight.
You're an important part of this movement to elect Beto as Texas' next governor, so I have to ask. [Will you chip in your first donation to end Week 1 with the momentum necessary to fire Greg Abbott?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/49642?refcode=ema20211121-163554&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=163554%2E444211%2EpvZucI)
Here's why this is so important: Before Beto announced for governor, Greg Abbott was building his fundraising machine. He already has a $55 million war chest ready, but our people-powered movement can outpace him.
**Abbott's record speaks for itself:**
→ Instead of updating our electricity grid, he's been cozying up with industry mega-donors.
→ Instead of protecting Texans from the deadly Covid-19 pandemic, he's made access to abortion, a basic health care procedure, illegal for many.
→ Instead of expanding our democracy, he signed one of the most extreme voter suppression bills in the country into law.
**The fringe policies and incompetence that we see in Texas today need to stop.** And by chipping in $3 or more before midnight, you're directly helping to defeat Abbott and elect a leader ready to represent ALL Texans.
[So, will you be one of the last grassroots donors we need from 18326 to chip in before we close the books on Week 1?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/49642?refcode=ema20211121-163554&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=163554%2E444211%2EpvZucI)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/49642?refcode=ema20211121-163554&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=163554%2E444211%2EpvZucI)**
We'll keep you updated,
Nick Rathod
Campaign Manager, Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20211121-163554-footer&t=22&refcode2=163554_444211_pvZucI&akid=163554%2E444211%2EpvZucI)**

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: We need every dollar, call, door knock, and rally.
body:
We’ve lost tight races before because support came in just too late.
#
Peter,
Early voting for our first 2022 primary will start in less than 90 days. Folks in TX-28, who we’re counting on to elect Justice Democrat Jessica Cisneros and oust anti-abortion corporate Democrat Henry Cuellar, can _apply_ for a mail ballot on January 1st. That’s so soon.
As soon as polls open and mail ballots arrive to voters in TX-28, we need to ensure folks are ready to elect Jessica — a progressive fighter for the people. Cuellar is the most conservative Democrat in the House, and we need to defeat him.
Our four other endorsed Justice Democrats will have elections coming up soon afterward. Jessica, Rana Abdelhamid, Kina Collins, Odessa Kelly, and Summer Lee all need our support _right now_ to defeat the Democratic establishment and expand the Squad in Congress.
**We’ve lost tight races** before because support came in just too late and we didn’t have enough time to build the momentum to overcome overwhelming odds. It happened with Jessica in 2020 when she lost to Cuellar by only 2,600 votes.
**We’ve also had incredible victories,** especially when we’ve had the resources to build a strong campaign from the beginning. We supported Jamaal Bowman’s unexpected victory against a top House Democrat in 2020 — we were there organizing and strategizing with him from the very beginning. It took Cori Bush two primaries to defeat a political dynasty in Missouri — the odds were stacked against her, but we were there every step of the way. We needed every dollar, rally, phone call, and door knock Cori’s campaign could muster to win.
And we know what Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez was able to do with our help. Peter, we’ve rocked the political world these last few years.
We run some of the leanest campaigns able to win huge upsets against the establishment. But this reality remains and it’s why we haven’t won every race we’ve run: Nearly 90% of Congressional races are won by the candidate who spends more money.
And here’s what the most recent available data shows candidates have in their campaign accounts for a couple of our races in TX-28 and TN-05:
Jessica Cisneros: $311,704
Henry Cuellar: $2,215,866
Odessa Kelly: $154,786
Jim Cooper: $1,065,331
Cuellar and Cooper will keep raking in money from Wall Street and corporate PACs. We can win these races even if we have less money, but we simply can’t be behind by these big margins. We’re relying on your help to counter their Wall Street money with a flood of grassroots donations — $5, $27, $50, whatever folks can afford. **We’re relying on you, Peter.**
**Can you make your first contribution to elect five more Justice Democrats to Congress?**
[→ Yes, I can donate to Justice Democrats today to help fuel progressive primaries, expand the Squad, and defeat corporate Democrats. ](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/84410?refcode=em20211121-20610&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=20610%2E1203867%2E_DKa8F) _Voting in our first 2022 primary will start in less than 90 days!_
**[Contribute](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/84410?refcode=em20211121-20610&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=20610%2E1203867%2E_DKa8F)**
In solidarity,
Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=3&akid=20610%2E1203867%2E_DKa8F) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=4&akid=20610%2E1203867%2E_DKa8F) and your state public health department.
---
